Name: Cushman & Wakefield - Formerly DTZ
Description:
Cushman & Wakefield is a global leader in commercial real estate services, helping clients transform the way people work, shop, and live. The firm’s 43,000 employees in more than 60 countries provides deep local and global insights that create significant value for occupiers and investors around the world. Cushman &
Wakefield is among the largest commercial real estate services firms with revenues of $5 billion across core 
services of agency leasing, asset services, capital markets, facility services (branded C&W Services), global 
occupier services, investment management (branded DTZ Investors), project & development services, tenant 
representation and valuation & advisory.

Name: 315Work Avenue
Description: 315Work Avenue ( A Nestavera Venture ) is a new age and rapidly growing co-working space provider that focuses on enterprise solutions. We aim to create vibrant auto-pilot ecosystem for employers and inspirational community work spaces that fosters innovation. Its design-driven workspaces and best-in-class services and amenities instill a sense of pride in its customers and empower the work community to be their best each day. The work space encourage community engagement of similar-minded individuals from any space – they may be investors, freelancers, founders or professionals who just want to focus work without getting distracted about running the office.

Name: Dalian Wanda Group
Description: Dalian Wanda Group, ranked #380 on the 2017 Fortune 500 list, was established in 1988 and has developed into a conglomerate of commercial management, culture, real estate and investment. Endeavoring to become a model in corporate social responsibility, we are the only company to have received the China Charity Award 9 times. Wanda is ambitious in its vision, demanding only the highest workplace standards, and striving to create a masterpiece with each one of its projects. We are also one of China's pioneer advocates in sustainable development.

Name: Irvine Company Office
Description:
We create places that bring people together to succeed. Our expert teams, uniquely flexible leasing model, and experience-driven amenities ensure our 3,000+ customers achieve more, every day. As a forever owner, we invest and reinvest in our 150+ workplaces so what’s exceptional today is even better tomorrow

We invest in our talented team with mentorship, training and an exceptional employee experience. United by our shared values and purpose, we’re building the future of work together.

Name: KingSett Capital
Description: KingSett Capital is a Canadian private equity real estate investment business which creates and co-invests in real estate investment solutions to deliver sustainable premium risk weighted returns. KingSett manages $18 billion in assets across its Growth, Income, Urban, Mortgage, Residential Development and Affordable Housing strategies.

Name: Ascencia Ltd
Description:
Ascencia, one of the top 10 listed companies on the Stock Exchange of Mauritius, stands as the leading retail property player in Mauritius.

With a portfolio of seven strategically located malls, namely Bagatelle Mall, Phoenix Mall, Riche Terre Mall, Bo'Valon Mall, So'flo, Kendra, and Les Allées, Ascencia is synonymous with creating singular shopping and leisure destinations that prioritise accessibility, sustainability, comfort and engagement for visitors and retailers alike.

Name: SYN
Description:
Somos a SYN, uma empresa referência no mercado imobiliário comercial brasileiro. Nosso compromisso é oferecer soluções de alta qualidade para nossos clientes, garantindo que cada ambiente colabore para o sucesso de seus negócios.

Atuamos em diversos segmentos do mercado imobiliário, como shoppings, edifícios comerciais e galpões, com um portfólio que abrange locação, administração, compra e venda de imóveis comerciais.

Em tudo o que fazemos, entregamos um atendimento personalizado e eficiente, sempre focados em facilitar a vida de nossos clientes.

Nosso time é composto por profissionais com grande experiência, autonomia e talento. Juntos, atuamos para atingir nosso propósito de integrar pessoas e espaços, criando ambientes que geram experiências incríveis.

Name: Landmark
Description:
At Landmark, we understand that great businesses need great places to work. And we know this isn’t just about bricks and mortar, furniture and technology. It’s about creating a professional experience that reflects your success, and a place you can call home. 

Our approach is to blend new ways of working with a business class experience. So we offer stunning communal spaces and inspiring design, alongside smartly presented, professional teams. 

We’re proud of our workspaces – and we know you will be too.

Our products include Private Offices, Meeting Rooms, Virtual Offices and Coworking Memberships so you can work however best suits you. 

For more information visit our website.

Name: Cassidy Turley
Description: DTZ is a global leader in commercial real estate services providing occupiers, tenants and investors around the world with a full spectrum of property solutions. Our core capabilities include agency leasing, tenant representation, corporate and global occupier services, property management, facilities management, facilities services, capital markets, investment and asset management, valuation, building consultancy, research, consulting, and project and development management. DTZ manages 3.3 billion square feet and $63 billion in transaction volume globally on behalf of institutional, corporate, government and private clients. Our more than 28,000 employees operate across more than 260 offices in more than 50 countries and proudly represent DTZ’s culture of excellence, client advocacy, integrity and collaboration.

Name: Amdec Group
Description:
Amdec is a privately owned property development, investment and project management group, with an established reputation as South Africa’s leading developer of new urban lifestyle solutions. Founded in 1989, the company is active in all sectors of the property industry with a national footprint to match its significant industry experience and brand development ethos.

Amdec’s current property portfolio places the company among the country’s biggest private property developers. The company’s outstanding growth may be attributed to a solid foundation of superior service, consistently high building standards and on-time delivery. These qualities underpin a focus on building brand equity and retaining industry leadership by creating innovative new urban spaces that embrace the foremost international trends.

Name: Arch-Con Corporation
Description:
Arch-Con Corporation is a national commercial general contractor founded in 2000 with offices in Houston, Dallas and Austin. 

Arch-Con’s award-winning team simplifies the construction process using the latest cost-efficient technologies to stay on the cutting edge of the industry. With experts in the construction of office, industrial, retail, hospitality, corporate interiors, healthcare, multifamily and community developments, we make construction easy. Learn more at www.arch-con.com.

Name: Azzam
Description:
Azzam es una sociedad gestora de patrimonio inmobiliario, parte del Grupo Azora, especializada en la prestación de servicios globales a vehículos de inversión (Property Management).

Actualmente gestiona activos inmobiliarios por valor de más de 1.850 millones de euros, gestionando un total de 13.000 viviendas, repartidas por toda España.

Azzam cuenta con un gran equipo humano: más de 150 profesionales expertos en la gestión integral de patrimonio inmobiliario.

Name: Commercial Real Estate Australia
Description:
Commercial Real Estate provides commercial property seekers access to comprehensive sale and lease listings.

We offer an integrated mix of media advertising solutions that spans online, print and mobile that is tailored for the Australian commercial property industry. Our solutions also provide national reach and visibility across premium publications including The Australian Financial Review, The Sydney Morning Herald and The Age. We give clients access to audiences that matter and provide expert commentary on the latest news, trends and commercial property insights. 

Keep up to date with the latest commercial property news delivered daily into your inbox - commercialrealestate.com.au/newsletters

Name: Pacific Retail Capital Partners
Description:
Evolving Real Estate for the Next Generation

Establishing mixed-use and community-centric places and spaces that enrich lives and create value.

Pacific Retail Capital Partners (PRCP) is one of the nation’s premier real estate investment groups of large format retail-led properties, with more than $3 billion in assets under management in the United States. Based in Southern California, PRCP strategically manages over 20 million square feet of regional, open-air lifestyle and mixed-use centers. With a proven track record of evolving and repositioning retail-led properties with a keen focus on unlocking the value and enhancing the quality of its growing portfolio, PRCP is dedicated to creating a unique and strategic vision for each property and exceeding the highest expectations of investors, retailers, and consumers.

Name: COPT Defense Properties
Description: COPT Defense Properties owns, manages, leases, develops, and acquires mission critical properties. We are the preeminent provider of real estate services to the U.S. Government and Defense/IT contractors, with buildings and developable land adjacent/proximate to hi-tech and cybersecurity-oriented USG defense installations executing priority missions. An S&P 400 company, our shares are listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CDP.

Name: Edamah (Bahrain Real Estate Investment)
Description: Edamah (Bahrain Real Estate Investment Company) is the real-estate arm of the sovereign wealth fund of the Kingdom of Bahrain. Incorporated in 2006 to manage and expand an assorted portfolio of real-estate in Bahrain, Edamah has established itself as one of the Kingdom’s leading property developers. With an unwavering commitment to its founding principles of quality, efficiency and sustainability, and in line with the highest standards of transparency and corporate governance, Edamah strives to transform the Kingdom’s diverse and dynamic property sector. Edamah’s portfolio will also include projects in the leisure and entertainment and industrial sectors.

Name: MCube Financial LLC
Description:
MCube Financial LLC is an international boutique consulting firm focused on providing advisory and consulting services to the commercial real estate industry. Our senior leadership team has over one hundred years of combined real estate experience across all property types, at all levels of the capital stack, as both principal and lender. 

 In addition to substantial underwriting, advisory and due diligence knowledge, the team brings a wealth of real estate servicing and work-out experience. With the capability to provide solutions to complex, large scale problems posing significant time and resource constraints, MCube partners with clients to develop long term relationships that add value across their organizations. 

 With offices in the US and India, MCube provides a broad talent base across time zones and the ability to provide scale and flexibility to clients around the world. Whether underwriting individual or pooled assets for a US based CMBS or balance sheet lender, underwriting a trophy US property for a Singaporean financial institution or re-underwriting a large non-performing European real estate portfolio, MCube has the expertise and manpower to exceed client expectations. 

Vision:
MCube’s vision is to become the most respected provider of due diligence, advisory and valuation support services to the commercial real estate industry. We want to develop long term partnerships with our clients by offering innovative and cost effective solutions to their most pressing problems. MCube services are based on values of honesty, integrity and consistency, and treating its clients and employees with dignity and respect.


Our client base is global and includes-
* Real Estate Lenders
* Institutional Investors
* Developers
* Brokers
* Borrowers
* Servicers

Client Services:
Loan Sizing, Full Underwriting, Asset Summary Reports, Cash Flow Modeling (ARGUS), Lease and Loan Abstracts, Site Inspections, Financial Modeling, B-piece Due Diligence

Name: Dermody
Description: Dermody is a privately-owned real estate investment, development and management firm that specializes in the acquisition and development of logistics real estate in strategic locations for e-commerce fulfillment centers, third-party logistics and distribution customers. Founded in 1960, Dermody has invested more than $10 billion of total capital across all platforms nationwide, having acquired and developed approximately 110 million square feet of logistics and industrial facilities. In addition to its corporate office in Reno, Nev., it has regional offices in northern and southern California, Atlanta, Phoenix, Seattle, Chicago, Dallas, Indianapolis and New Jersey. For more information, visit www.Dermody.com.

Name: NewQuest
Description: Established in 2001, NewQuest is a privately held, full-service commercial real estate firm specializing in development, land brokerage, leasing, tenant representation, investment sales, and property management. Headquartered in Houston, our portfolio comprises over 100 retail and mixed-use projects valued at more than $2.3 billion. We oversee leasing for more than 12 million square feet of commercial space across Texas, Louisiana, Arizona, Georgia, and other key markets nationwide. NewQuest has been consistently recognized as one of Houston Business Journal’s Best Places to Work.

Name: Vail Williams
Description:
Vail Williams are a team of property specialists with over 30 years of experience and a wealth of high quality clients.

Our large, flexible and mobile team have both ‘Commercial’ and ‘Residential’ expertise in all property disciplines across 6 main regions. We find that local knowledge is a definite strength but we are equally able to flex our muscles by combining experts from different disciplines and regions to provide multi region or national advice of the highest order.

We understand that your property needs as a Vail Williams client will vary hugely depending on whether you are an occupier, landlord, owner, investor, developer or professional referrer. We have expertise in pretty much every business area in both the private and public sectors. 
Our highly specialised teams are all tailored to ensure delivery of client objectives. They are made up of experienced individuals who concentrate on specific aspects of property, ensuring the highest quality, expert advice. We pride ourselves on our excellent reputation and high levels of client satisfaction.

Name: Blacks Business Brokers
Description:
The Number 1 Business Broker with over 60 Years of expertise in selling.

We are continually looking to improve every aspect of our business, from customer service, successful utilisation of the latest technology and the delivery of the highest quality business information.

At Blacks Business Brokers we understand there is no substitute for knowledge and experience. Our dedicated and professional team has over 60 years combined expertise in the Business brokering Sector and therefore we know the important factors in achieving results. Blacks Business Brokers aims to provide a comfortable one-to-one experience with a unique way of launching businesses on to the market. Forward thinking alongside an innovative attitude are designed to offer a professional, efficient service on a more approachable level.

Whether you are seeking to buy or sell a business, Blacks Business Brokers offer a fresh approach with a personal touch. As a seller you are able to take advantage of unmatched promotion of your business to qualified purchasers and as a buyer you receive the freshest database of business for sale with the most accurate and trustworthy detailed information.

Name: EMAREA Immobilier Entreprise El-Djazair

Name: CANMOOR
Description: Canmoor is a private commercial property business with a proven track record for originating, implementing and delivering a wide variety of property solutions. Since its inception in 2005, Canmoor has acquired, managed, developed and sold over £5 billion of commercial property assets. Canmoor currently manages a portfolio in excess of 12,000,000 sqft with over 700 tennants across the UK.

Name: NAIOP SoCal
Description:
NAIOP, the Commercial Real Estate Development Association, is the leading organization for developers, owners and investors of office, industrial, retail and mixed-use real estate. At the national level, the organization represents more than 18,500 commercial real estate professionals who gain from unparalleled networking, trend-driven research, educational programs and powerful legislative representation.

At the local level, the chapter is the industry’s greatest ally and resource. Serving Orange and Los Angeles counties, NAIOP SoCal comprises more than 1,200 members making it the leading commercial real estate trade association in Southern California.

NAIOP SoCal Chapter’s mission is to provide a unified voice to protect and enhance the commercial real estate industry and quality of life in Southern California. This is accomplished through proactive involvement in public policy, superior educational programs and interactive business relationship opportunities.

Membership in as well as sponsorship of NAIOP SoCal is the best return on investment you can make in your commercial real estate career and business. Contact us for more information.

Name: RECAM Solutions
Description:
RECAM Solutions is a trusted partner for end-to-end Commercial Real Estate (CRE) lease management services. We specialise in delivering comprehensive support through Lease Abstraction, Lease Administration, Lease Translation, Lease Audits, and Contract Validation services.

We empower property managers, landlords, tenants, and enterprises with the tools and expertise needed to simplify and standardise lease processes, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and compliance across their entire portfolio.

Whether you're managing a local portfolio or navigating global leases across multiple languages, RECAM delivers reliable, cost-effective solutions tailored to your business needs. Our expert team has successfully served clients in retail, healthcare, telecom, industrial, and corporate real estate sectors.

Our strengths include:

1. Lease abstraction across 45+ languages
2. Compliance-focused lease audits
3. IND AS116-aligned lease management (India-specific)
4. Translation services for Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 languages
5. Standardised formats, high accuracy, and quick turnarounds

Leasing should be innovative, scalable, and simple. With RECAM, you gain a strategic partner committed to operational excellence, risk mitigation, and client success.

Name: Basis Investment Group, LLC ("Basis")
Description:
Basis Investment Group LLC (“Basis”) is a commercial real estate (CRE) investment manager, primarily focused on debt and structured equity strategies.  Basis originates and acquires diversified CRE debt investments across the capital stack of stabilized, transitional, and development assets throughout the United States.  Basis was founded in 2009 by Tammy K. Jones in partnership with JEMB Realty Corporation, a U.S. real estate company established over 30 years ago.  JEMB owns and manages approximately eight million square feet of commercial real estate assets. Basis is a certified Minority and Woman Owned Business.

Basis originates and invests in the following CRE debt products: 

•	Fixed rate CMBS loans and B pieces
•	Bridge loans
•	Mezzanine financing
•	Preferred equity
•	Structured equity/JV Equity
•	Distressed debt
•	FreddieMac - Small Balance Loans

Asset classes include:
•	Multifamily
•	Retail
•	Office
•	Industrial
•	Hotels (limited and full-service)
•	Senior Housing Properties
•	Self-Storage
•	Manufactured Housing Community


COMPANY HIGHLIGHTS

•	DEMONSTRATED TRACK RECORD OF SUCCESS ACROSS THE CAPITAL STACK - Since 2009, Basis has made over $2.5 billion in CRE debt and structured equity investments.  

•	EXPERIENCED TEAM - Members of the Basis Senior Management Team have been investing together for more than 15 years at Basis and prior firms.    
 
•	EXTENSIVE NETWORK OF RELATIONSHIPS - The Senior Management Team’s combined 60 + years of experience in the real estate industry fosters a broad array of industry relationships that drive an active investment pipeline.   

•	ESTABLISHED INVESTMENT PLATFORM  - Basis has a national platform with an established brand that is widely recognized across the United States.

Name: Inversiones Aliadas
Description: Somos una empresa que se dedica al desarrollo, comercialización y operación de proyectos inmobiliarios en Honduras.

Name: Block Real Estate Services, LLC
Description:
Block Real Estate Services, LLC (BRES) is a full-service commercial real estate company managing over 45 million square feet of retail, office, and industrial properties for equity partnerships and third party owners.  BRES’s portfolio of services continues its role as the most comprehensive commercial real estate firm in Kansas City by providing and specializing in: real estate brokerage services, tenant representation, investment services, asset and property management, economic incentives consultation, financial services, construction and development services, and the Block Funds. 

We continue to grow by better serving our existing clients and expanding our real estate operations into other surrounding communities. BRES is headquartered in the heart of Kansas City’s Country Club Plaza district with a regional office in St. Louis. BRES also has management offices in properties located in Overland Park and Lenexa, Kansas; Riverside and St. Louis, Missouri as well as operation offices in several of our office portfolio properties.

Name: Douglas Development Corporation
Description:
Since 1985, Douglas Development Corporation has garnered redevelopment successes in the District of Columbia, Virginia and Maryland.  The company has earned a reputation for revitalizing underdeveloped, emerging areas.

Founder and President Douglas Jemal established the company in 1985 as a private family-owned company and it has since grown into a fully integrated real estate developer with more than 150 employees.  

Between 1990-2017 the company expanded its portfolio from less than 250,000 sf to over 10 million sf expanding from 15 properties to over 250.  Its specialty is restoring and preserving mixed-use buildings with the most well-known projects located in the East End of Washington serving as catalysts for the redevelopment of the entire area.

The current portfolio is over 17 million sf and there is more than 5 million sf in the development pipeline.  Douglas Development one of the most dominant and successful real estate developers in the Washington area.

Name: EastGroup Properties Inc
Description: EastGroup Properties, Inc. is a self-administered equity real estate investment trust focused on the development, acquisition and operation of industrial properties in major Sunbelt markets throughout the United States with an emphasis in the states of Florida, Texas, Arizona, California and North Carolina. The Company’s strategy for growth is based on ownership of premier distribution facilities generally clustered near major transportation features in supply-constrained submarkets.

Name: VVA - Part of Drees & Sommer
Description: At VVA, we become an integral part of your team, serving as trusted advisors who are deeply invested in your success. Our mission is to deliver successful projects that enhance the built environment for the benefit of others by focusing meticulously on your interests and goals from start to finish. With specialized expertise across all phases—from planning to occupancy—we’re committed to delivering value that elevates every aspect of your project. We are proud to be part of Drees & Sommer, a global leader in sustainable and innovative project management for the real estate, infrastructure, and industrial markets, enhancing our ability to deliver even more value to our clients through expanded global insights and resources.

Name: Childress Klein
Description: As one of the largest real estate development, investment and management companies in the Southeast, Childress Klein has developed more than 50 million square feet of commercial real estate and owns assets valued at more than $2 billion. Guided by the highest standards, we recognize that each property and client need is unique. With more than 31 years of dedicated commercial real estate experience, backed by a team of 280 dedicated and experience professionals, we take a hands-on approach to investment, development and management by putting our client’s needs and interests first. Building upon the legacy established by Fred Klein and Don Childress, we are passionate about delivering exceptional customer service, collaborating with our clients and building relationships that last.

Name: The Student Housing Company UK
Description:
We are The Student Housing Company. We want to raise your expectations about student accommodation, service, building quality and communication.

We want students to find renting a room from us incredibly easy and we want them to feel safe, comfortable and looked after. We want their parents to have peace of mind and we want the students to recommend us to other people.

We try to make everything we do as clear and upfront as possible. From our plain speaking name to the refreshingly simple job titles on our team's badges, we want students who rent from us to understand what they're getting and who they're talking to at all times.

Our goal is to have buildings close to lots of UK universities. We want these occupied 100% of the time. We can only do this by being excellent.

Name: BOMI - Building Owners and Managers Institute
Description:
BOMI, a nonprofit educational organization founded in 1970, provides critical education and expertise to industry personnel with property, facility, and building systems management responsibilities. 

As the Building Owners and Managers Institute, BOMI delivers courses, certificate programs, and industry-standard designations—Real Property Administrator (RPA), Facilities Management Administrator (FMA), Systems Maintenance Administrator (SMA), Systems Maintenance Technician (SMT), and High-Performance Sustainable Buildings (BOMI-HP)—with a proven record of increasing job performance and company efficiency. 

More than 40,000 industry professionals hold one or more BOMI International designations, and over 90,000 property and facility management professionals have turned to BOMI for their continuing education, professional development, and staff training needs. 

To learn more, please visit www.boma.org/education/, call 1.800.235.BOMI (2664), or email service@bomi.org.

Name: V7
Description:
V7 is the most creative and forward-thinking asset and development management company you could choose to work with. We are passionate about transforming mismanaged office and industrial buildings or sites into dynamic, highly sustainable, service led workplaces.

Our core aim is to add value to buildings by repositioning them in line with the very latest workplace trends and ESG credentials.

We work with partners including institutional funds, family offices, private equity and individual investors.

We also work with owners looking to drive value though intensive asset and development management of their existing assets.

Name: Spire Property Solutions
Description:
At Spire Property Solutions, we are experts in South Africa’s commercial real estate market, offering over 25 years of industry experience. We specialize in helping businesses navigate complex property decisions, whether it's leasing or buying, with tailored solutions to fit your unique needs. Our comprehensive services cover everything from property management and leasing to investment sales and corporate real estate services. Partnering with Spire means you gain a trusted advisor who understands the market and is committed to delivering value-driven results. Let us help you make informed property decisions that drive your business forward. 

Our vision is to be South Africa’s foremost commercial real estate service provider, recognized for our leadership in sustainability, service innovation, and delivering tailored property solutions that maximize returns for our clients. Our team is composed of highly qualified property professionals with deep experience across all sectors of the real estate market. This extensive knowledge allows us to anticipate market trends and provide strategic guidance that aligns with our clients’ objectives.

Name: AGL Espacio Inmobiliario
Description:
¿Quiénes Somos?
AGL ESPACIO INMOBILIARIO es una empresa conformada por expertos en el mercado inmobiliario, con más de 15 años de experiencia, que trabajan para integrar proyectos comerciales con la mejor rentabilidad mediante una filosofía de ganar-ganar con los propietarios/vendedores, arrendadores, inversionistas y brokers.

Name: Oxford Development Company
Description:
Oxford Development Company is a premiere full-service commercial real estate firm with a solid foundation of  a 50-year history and is the largest, privately owned real estate development/services firm in Pennsylvania.  The company’s owned/managed portfolio consists of retail, office, institutional, healthcare, residential, industrial and sports and entertainment assets throughout the United States.

Oxford has the unique ability to offer an integrated package of turnkey real estate services in development, property management, project management, brokerage and leasing and investment advisory services to all commercial real estate asset classes.  Unlike companies who only focus on a single service, Oxford has the distinct advantage of leveraging its different business groups and affiliates to create customized solutions that maximize the

Oxford and its affiliates have worked with such clients as Fortune 100 Companies, over 20 national retailers, government agencies and community and nonprofit groups on its way to overseeing more than $1 billion of commercial real estate. H.J. Heinz, BNY Mellon, PNC Financial Services Group, Highmark, Inc., UPMC Health System, Pittsburgh Cultural Trust and the Sports and Exhibition Authority of Pittsburgh and Allegheny County are just a few of the companies that rely on Oxford’s commitment to quality and excellence to maximize and protect their investments.

Oxford has been involved in over 4.5 million square feet of LEED certified projects.

Name: Student Castle
Description: Student Castle Limited is a student accommodation provider. We have a track record for unique accommodation with sites across the UK. Each scheme is specifically tailored to the city and its students. We offer contemporary and uniquely designed studio rooms and flats to suit however the student wants to live. We also provide state-of-the-art common areas and social study spaces. All our residences are equipped with the latest technology and onsite gyms & bike rentals.

Name: TRASTOR Property Investments

Name: Reddzebra
Description:
THINK DIFFERENTLY

Redd Zebra challenges itself and our Clients to think differently. It’s in our DNA to challenge the status quo and think differently about how our Clients’ challenges can be met. Thinking differently by looking at the challenge and working backwards to find solutions that are smarter, simpler and more intuitive. Our thinking differently about our Clients’ needs and challenges is engendered in our name. We challenge our Clients to think differently about us; starting with our unconventional name, our unorthodox spelling of ‘red’ and our refreshing and disruptive approach to the way we offer our services.
 
THE STORY
The ‘Red(d) Zebra’ is based on a folklore told by African tribesman. It is said that the Red(d) Zebra will appear in times of need, when you are lost, and need direction to reach your goal. It is said that the Red(d) Zebra will lead you to the ‘truce of the water hole’ where everyone works collaboratively for the collective benefit of all.
 
THE METAPHOR
The African folklore (and beautiful metaphor) together with a drive to disrupt the current consulting experience, culminated in the inception of Redd Zebra; a collective of like-minded consultants who think differently and work collaboratively to provide a higher level of service that leads you to the achievement of your goal(s). Redd Zebra is driven to provide the expertise and results you expect but never truly experience.  

THE WHAT
Redd Zebra provides Asset & Building Advisory services throughout the property (asset) continuum; from origination, acquisition and operation to re-positioning and disposal.  We work with you to minimise and mitigate risk, reduce unnecessary costs and optimise returns.

WHY REDD ZEBRA?
It is said that people engage on the Why not the What of a business. Our Why is enabling you to achieve your project goals.  Our success is measured in its attainment. 

Welcome to Redd Zebra…think differently

 Online Courses
 Live Events
 In-Office Training
 One-on-one Coaching

We also offer state approved continuing educations courses in California and Texas, as well as coaching and training programs for real estate brokers and franchise owners who want to create additional revenue through commercial real estate transactions, but are concerned about the liability associated with untrained agents venturing into commercial.

Whether you are an agent seeking to transition into commercial real estate as a full-time career or part-time,  an association seeking to provide value to your members, or a broker seeking to equip your agents to tap into the 11 trillion dollar commercial industry, the NCREA can provide you with the resources you need to exceed your goals.

作为中国首个聚焦地产与地产金融领域的行业联盟，国际金融地产联盟(IFFRE)致力于打造全球金融地产交流对话的中国舞台，并推进国内实践接轨国际标准。联盟会员均为来自地产与地产金融行业的专业人士，汇聚了中国金融地产全产业链的中坚力量。联盟本着专注、专业、创新、诚信、共赢的精神，整合国内外行业顶尖资源，联合各大国际权威专业协会，成为中国金融地产标准化的领航者。

Name: Concord Properties, LLC
Description:
In the early years, the Concord portfolio was both geographically and functionally diverse. Properties were held, on the West Coast, the Rocky Mountains, the South Eastern United States, and of course, in Texas. Concord functioned both as a developer and an investment partner with local developers who had local knowledge in new, unfamiliar markets. Eventually, Concord ventured into non-real estate ventures, including mining, food service and golf courses.

In the mid-1990s, Concord made the strategic decision to redirect its focus back to the San Antonio market and to primarily concentrate future growth on real estate endeavors. It was at this time that Concord also decided that, except for projects in which it had no development experience, Concord would act as the developer, with or without partners. Philosophically, Concord has steered its efforts towards developing high quality, but affordable projects. Management strongly believes that the best result is not always the most expensive endeavor.

Concord Properties is known as a small, but experienced, high-end boutique developer of commercial real estate with a reputation to hold and manage their portfolio, and not to sell. Quality from the ground up and responsive hands on management, define us. Our tenants are our best references.

Description:

In 2017, the company facilitated over $80m in transactions in 2017.  These transactions included $32m along the King St corridor of the Charleston peninsula.  This represented just a fraction of the teams yearly production, however it incorporated many high profile deals including the Bob Ellis building (332 King), the Dixie Furniture building (529 King), and the old Charleston Bookstore (360 King).

Description:
InteRisk is an ALL operational risk specialist. 

The strength in our service delivery is built on the depth of technical expertise and diversity of platforms we deliver to assist our clients in all areas of operational business risk. 

We have not rushed into our corporate growth. We have instead invested in seeking the best people from a greater range of specialties to give a depth of quality and industry experience. We have our graduate programs that have produced recognised industry experts and we continue to watch and learn from our clients every day to assess their needs and exposures, ensuring that we can be the leading edge of their Operational Risk Plans. 

Our guiding principles of “Accuracy and Honesty” have served the company well and can be seen in the relationships we have with many of our clients and the people we have worked with going back over 20 years, we are very proud of our history.

Our services include:

Audit & Inspection: Our aim is to improve the performance standards that is evident to our clients, their clients and stakeholders. We are not in the business of identifying hazards and moving on, we will assist, guide, recommend actions and follow up to achieve good practice and compliance.

Business Solutions: We offer a vast array of specialised solutions including safety, risk, incident management, security, technology, learning and development just to name a few.

Technology: Our “Tech Platforms” have been designed to bring all your Risk Management, Compliance, Inspection and Reporting requirements together by linking all elements into one easy to use platform. 

Educational Processes: Our education solutions are individually tailored and incorporate technology-based eLearning, webinars and the facilitation of Face-to-Face sessions or a combination of these.

Membres actifs de la FNAIM de Loire-Atlantique, nous avons également assumé avec fierté la responsabilité de la Commission Commerces, contribuant à dynamiser les échanges et à renforcer le lien entre les acteurs du secteur.

Décembre 2024 marque un tournant historique pour notre entreprise : Aggecom Développement Nantes rejoint Loire Océan Expansion, renforçant ainsi une vision commune et des valeurs partagées autour de la proximité, de l’agilité, et du "parler vrai". Cette union reflète notre volonté de répondre encore mieux aux besoins des entreprises et des commerçants, tout en élargissant notre ancrage régional et nos perspectives de développement.

Ensemble, nous poursuivons avec ambition notre mission de soutien aux entreprises dans leurs projets, en nous appuyant sur une expertise solide et une approche humaine.

The Indiana Affordable Housing Council (“IAHC”) is a membership organization founded in 2012. The organization was created to promote the preservation and expansion of affordable housing for individuals and families throughout the State of Indiana. IAHC advances its mission through education, information and constructive relationships with state, local and federal officials.

IAHC’s membership is comprised of organizations involved in all aspects of affordable housing. Members include both non-profit and private companies including owners, property managers, developers, financial institutions, investors, builders, local government, attorneys, accountants, civic organizations, and consultants.

Description:

Goman+York, provides expert advice to municipalities, institutions, and businesses as well as landlords, tenants, owners and real estate investors. We partner with our clients to deliver custom, “real world” solutions that consistently exceed those clients expectations.

WHO WE SERVE

Name: Escrick Park Estate
Description:
Escrick Park can provide the perfect working environment.  Avoid the traffic chaos and take a short drive out of York to our tranquil workspace.  Small to medium offices available, complete with all modern facilities, a landlord who cares and a dedicated team on hand to help with any issues.

We are a small business with years of experience in property lettings and management.  Owned by the same family for 300 years, we retain the historic detail but with a modern outlook.  

Also available, land hire for weddings or corporate functions, horse riding course, holiday homes for sale.

Call us now for more details.

In 2021 we began developing our vision for Heronby - a carefully masterplanned new village, inspired by the character and function of traditional North Yorkshire communities, and fit for the 21st century. 

Heronby will lie to the south west of the village of Escrick, midway between Selby and York, on a site owned by Escrick Park Estate. It will have its own market square with a high street, business space, new schools and a broad mix of homes to meet the needs of families, first time buyers and older people. 

The proposal for Heronby is in response to Selby District Council’s requirement to allocate land for new homes in its emerging Local Plan which provides a template for future development up to 2040. 

Escrick Park Estate is committed to ensuring Heronby is an enduring success. It is investing in the development of a masterplan for Heronby and inviting the community to share ideas as part of the design phase. Visit www.heronby.co.uk for more information.

Name: The MacKenzie Building
Description:
Welcome to The MacKenzie Building – a striking former church thoughtfully redeveloped into contemporary office spaces with modern amenities. Located where Aberdeen’s City Centre meets the West End, this distinctive property offers the perfect opportunity for professionals and businesses seeking a conveniently located workspace with a prominent and prestigious Aberdeen address.

The MacKenzie Building combines architectural character with modern functionality. Inside, you’ll find a mix of open-plan and private office spaces, each designed to accommodate a range of business needs – from solo professionals to growing teams. Whether you're looking for a compact space to focus or a full floor for collaborative work, flexible options are available from 136 sq ft to 423 sq ft, with larger full-floor leases also on offer.

Fully refurbished individual offices are available now from just £350/month +  VAT. 1Gbps fibre internet/Wi-Fi, electricity, gas, water usage, waste, cleaning, maintenance, and repairs are all included.*

Looking for something more substantial? The entire top floor – offering 1,880 sq ft of self-contained space – is available now on an FRI lease at £2,275 per month + VAT.

The MacKenzie Building features a newly installed shared kitchen and community space as well as fully upgraded WC facilities.

Located just a 5-minute walk from Union Street and Rosemount Viaduct, it also provides easy access to local restaurants, cafés, shops, amenities, and public transport.

If you're a professional or business in Aberdeen looking for a centrally-located, modern workspace with all the comforts and conveniences that can make your work day easier and more enjoyable – contact us today and make The MacKenzie Building the new home of your business.

For more information or to schedule a viewing, you'll find the link to our MacKenzie Building web page in our LinkedIn profile.

Name: Commercial Space (Commercial Property in Cape Town)
Description:
Commercial space assists you in locating your office, warehouse or commercial property investment.

"Effective use of property can increase profitability, attract quality staff, enhance your image and make your business more efficient and easy to run.”

We realize the importance of property to your business as it is an issue which impacts on every company in Cape Town. It is vital that businesses think about property issues and the effect that property – from use to location – has on competitiveness.

In Cape Town we are noticing significant change in the property market and any successful business cannot afford to ignore this key area.

For most companies property is the second highest business cost.

Commercial property usually represents over a third of total business assets;
and running costs can be the second highest cost after wages. Property is therefore key to business success: not only does it dominate your financial
statements, but it can also provide real competitive advantage through its location, the working and sales environments it provides, and
the image and profile it supports.

A lack of strategic awareness around property means that many companies have little knowledge of their property costs.

Thus, wellspaces Group has created a new set of brands, that gives people a different choice. Spaces to count on, that are different enough to be fun. The company now provides not only a great living experience to our members, but also an active discovery that the members can control. The spaces will inspire the members to be creative by giving them a new perspective. The new brands are also committed to create feelings of personal growth, enrichment and a sense of community and affiliation beyond delivering a beautiful design and accommodating spaces—where an environment that celebrates simplicity, authenticity and originality whereby familiar comforts are combined, with the indulgences of thoughtful amenities and features—creating spaces that’s not cookie-cutter.

Name: Helm
Description:
For most business leaders, real estate is viewed as just another cost of doing business.
In our experience over the last 12 years, we have seen this mindset dominate, over and over again.
Leaders view the places their teams work and the properties they operate out of as little more than
a requirement to be in business.

While there’s nothing damaging about this approach, it is probably one of the most consistently
missed opportunities in business and in real estate.

We want to end that.

We believe real estate should be viewed as a business opportunity, not a business expense.
If executed correctly, real estate is a revenue generator for business, regardless of the business you
are in. So why isn’t this approach the strategy everyone employs?

A big reason is that brokerage services have become commoditized. Real estate, by its nature, is
transactional. This reality has created a transactional mindset among many brokers, who do not
view themselves as strategic partners of their clients. Nor do they see themselves in a position to
help clients achieve their clients’ own strategic goals.

We work differently.

Our approach is to understand how your business works, then how real estate could work for your
business.

We want to work with leaders with businesses that have high real estate costs, multiple locations,
and require multiple real estate asset types to conduct business. We want to work with innovative
leaders – especially those going through a new executive leadership integration or expansion, a
merger and acquisition, relocation or dissolution. We are seeking an exclusive relationship to serve
a company’s real estate interests and want to be known as their in-house real estate department
and team member.

Helm is not for everyone. But we are the go-to choice where innovative thinking and complex
projects converge.

If you know someone who is looking for a partner to create a winning corporate real estate strategy,
I would be honored with the introduction.

Description:
Hexagon Business Centres provides serviced office space to rent, meeting rooms and virtual office services incl. mailboxes and call answering in central Witney, Oxfordshire. Name: DC Squared Management, LLC
Description:
DC Squared Management, LLC facilitates the efficient scaling of your company's projects by integrating our expertise as an external department or team extension. Our on-demand capabilities seamlessly align with the specific needs of your projects, offering flexibility and cost-effectiveness.

Functioning as an on-demand extension, we seamlessly collaborate with your existing management team, presenting a menu of flexible capabilities tailored to your project requirements. Whether it's comprehensive project management, turn-key construction management, or internal team support, our approach enables you to choose and deploy services with efficiency.

The advantages of utilizing our on-demand external department or team extension are substantial. Firstly, it boosts efficiency and capability, allowing your company to maintain a leaner internal team while scaling up as necessary for increased project capacity. This strategic focus on high-priority projects ensures optimal resource allocation, letting your team concentrate on key initiatives while outsourcing the management of other projects.

Furthermore, our approach leads to a reduction in corporate overhead costs, optimizing financial resources for greater profitability. By streamlining operations and strategically positioning your company for efficient project execution, we contribute to significant cost savings.

In summary, DC Squared Management, LLC offers a streamlined and strategic approach to project management. Our on-demand services empower your company with flexibility, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness, ensuring optimal results and enhanced profitability.

Name: MJT Larose Inc.
Description:
MJT Larose est une entreprise multidisciplinaire œuvrant principalement dans le développement et la location d’immeubles commerciaux. L’entreprise, fondée en 1959 par M. Fidèle Larose, a passée par divers secteurs d’activités à travers le temps et les générations, tel que des encan d’animaux, marchés aux puces, épicerie, guichets automatiques, bar, hôtel, développement immobilier résidentiel et commercial et site internet d’annonces classées. Ainsi, l’entreprise a su progresser à travers les différentes opportunités qui se sont présentées, devenant un acteur majeur de l’industrie touristique et commercial dans la région de Gatineau. 
MJT Larose en est maintenant à la troisième génération et possède un portefeuille d’actifs immobiliers de près de 130 000 pi2 d’immeubles commerciaux, ainsi que différentes entreprises d’opérations en restaurations,  media web et marché public.
En plus d’avoir près de 30 employés à travers ses filiales et participé à la création de centaine d’emplois par l’entremise de ses développements immobiliers, l’entreprise s’est impliqué socialement d’année en année en appuyant plusieurs causes qu’ils lui tiennent à cœur. À travers divers événements qu’elle organise et des nombreux dons, l’entreprise à remis à travers les années près de 500 000$ à divers organismes, soit sportives, communautaires, médicales et autres.

Assembl remet en place votre branding à chaque rotation, pour que votre équipe se sente toujours chez elle.

Pourquoi choisir Assembl ?
- Réduction des coûts immobiliers, ne payez que lorsque vous avez besoin d'être au bureau
- Développement de la culture d'entreprise et de la cohésion en évitant la rotation des équipes
- Pas de compromis sur votre univers de marque employeur
- Flexibilité (contrat de prestation de service 12 mois)
- Services et équipements IT inclus

Propriétaire d'un ou de plusieurs bureaux ?
Opérer des bureaux avec Assembl permet d'en augmenter le rendement tout en diminuant le risque, celui-ci étant dilué entre plusieurs entreprises utilisatrices. Contactez-nous.

Assembl offers part-time fully serviced and branded office space for companies embracing working from home. We enable our clients to assemble their entire team a certain number of days per week, only paying for the days they are in.

Name: Bridge Business & Property Brokers
Description:
Voted by Inc. Magazine as one of the Fastest Growing companies in America, Bridge Business & Property Brokers specializes in the buying & selling of businesses; acting as the intermediary in bringing qualified buyers to business sellers to provide a seamless transfer of ownership.
 
The company’s expertise also extends into franchise & business consulting, mergers & acquisitions, commercial real estate brokerage, commercial insurance, franchise opportunities, & facilitating third party financing. Our new funding division provides the following services to clients: financing, equipment leasing & accounts receivable factoring. Bridge Business & Property Brokers s an innovative industry leader & the expertise we provide our Brokers is of tremendous value. Bridge is the one of the largest business brokerage firms.

Our extensive database of investors, buyers & listings nationwide as well as an interactive web terminal all make Bridge an innovative industry leader. Our mission is to strive to put customers first – we focus on reaching satisfaction from both parties; buyer & seller.

Plan for your future with Bridge Business & Property Brokers.

There are over 29.6 million businesses in the US. Each business sells on average every 4-5 years; resulting in approximately 4.9 million businesses for sale each year. With fewer than 4,000 business brokers in the country, there is a significant opportunity for business brokers. In fact, given these statistics, it works out to potential listings of 1,225 per broker. 

Bridge is growing & we are seeking highly motivated individuals to assist in the brokering of many different types of business sales. The job of a business broker is an exciting & challenging departure from most careers. Business Brokers are very well compensated.  By positioning yourself with one of the best in this industry, you will be positioning yourself to earn 6 figures. The financial rewards are limitless, as there are no earning caps.

Name: Devotio Capital Management
Description:
Devotio Capital Management, The Real Estate Private Bank, is a real estate investment manager with a new approach to serving domestic and international ultra-high net worth’s and select family offices and RIAs (“UHNW”).  We are an ‘outsourced family office real estate team’ executing optimal investment strategies designed, directed and structured for investors. 
 
Devotio was founded to address two fundamental problems facing UHNW real estate investors: (i) short-term hold, high fee structures ill-suited to the asset class, and (ii) ‘one size fits all’, indirect fund products.   What we provide is fundamentally different: i) generational perspective, ii) highly tax focused and efficient, iii) collaborative and direct, iv) investor retains discretion.  

Devotio delivers a dedicated, institutional real estate investment capability without the cost of directly hiring, managing and paying for it.  We work with UHNW to execute both comprehensive strategies and discrete investing programs (QOZ, Green Buildings, GP platforms).   Devotio allows UHNW to efficiently invest spanning domestic markets and real estate asset classes.

Name: Atlanta Emerging Markets, Inc.
Description:
Atlanta Emerging Markets, Inc. (“AEMI”) is a community development entity, wholly-owned by the Atlanta Development Authority (d/b/a Invest Atlanta), that seeks to spur job creation, economic development and neighborhood revitalization in the City of Atlanta.  AEMI provides innovative, flexible financing products to high-impact, credit-challenged businesses and real estate development projects.

AEMI manages the City's New Markets Tax Credits (NMTC) program and has received $198MM of allocation from the U.S. Department of the Treasury since 2007.  The New Markets program aims to finance projects that create quality jobs accessible to low-income residents, provide services that benefit low-income communities, expand affordable housing, allow flexible lease rates for locally-owned businesses, and improve access to healthy foods.

AEMI has allocated over $136 million to 10 redevelopment projects, including Aerotropolis Atlanta, the Center for Civil and Human Rights, The Flatiron Building, and Grady Memorial Hospital's new emergency room department.  The ten projects have created more than 3,500 construction jobs and 4,000 permanent jobs for Atlanta's under-served communities.

Businesses or developers with sites in census designated low-income neighborhoods can apply for NMTC loans of $5 million+ to finance the construction of new facilities, equipment, or operating expenses to expand a business.  The financing is typically structured as a 7-year, interest-only loan with the option to convert about 20% of the loan into equity at the end of the loan term.

AEMI has also created new programs designed to aid small businesses in Atlanta, including the Advantage Loan Fund and the Atlanta Catalyst Fund, a $500,000 small business revolving loan fund that provides $50,000-$100,000 loans to qualifying businesses.

𝐍𝐞𝐭𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠

Our Battle of the Broker Bands fundraiser raises thousands of dollars for local charities, showcases our members’ artistic talents and provides a fun-filled networking opportunity.

With so many tenant representation agents in attendance, this is unique opportunity to ‘pitch’ your listing will help you refine your pitching skills, expand your network and fill your pipeline.

Make an investment in yourself, your business and your community... become a TRAOBA member today!

Notre vision : faire de l’immobilier un levier d’optimisation de votre performance.

Dès lors que votre entreprise cherche à réduire ses coûts, à gagner en flexibilité, à gérer sa croissance, à renforcer son attractivité RH, à changer son image, à améliorer ses pratiques en terme de développement durable, etc… l’outil immobilier est un levier clé à prendre en compte.

Nous apportons nos compétences et notre expertise dans les domaines suivants :

- Recherche de sièges sociaux et locaux, à la location et / ou à l’acquisition et négociations

Name: Appelt Properties
Description:
Typically commercial real estate is an investment vehicle available only to very wealthy individuals, or large corporations. Offering a potent combination of profit and security, many fortunes have been forged through the acquisition of land and the development of commercial real estate properties. 

Unfortunately securing the financing for developments at this scale isn’t something most individuals can manage on their own, which is how we came into existence and where our business model takes a profound turn. We are an organization that brings together a small number of individuals who collectively are able to secure the financing to build, lease and manage first-rate developments. To date, by partnering with more than 40 individuals across Western Canada, we have developed over 300,000 square feet of commercial real estate. This shared ownership structure gives individuals access to high quality commercial investments that would’ve otherwise been out of reach. As our business advances so does health care in the developing world.

For every building Appelt Properties develops, we provide the funding for a nurse practitioner to open and run his or her own medical practice in Kenya. These sister buildings provide the people in their communities access to basic health care that would otherwise be out of reach, such as access to low-cost, high-quality essential drugs and health care services.

Take the unnecessary doubt, costs and risk out of the commercial property equation. 

Turn our expertise to your commercial property advantage.

Name: Spacenow
Description:
spacenow.com is a global peer-to-peer marketplace where you can rent any type of space on a short term basis.

By making more space available, with more flexible terms, we lower the barrier of entry for new or young businesses that need space to operate.  We remove the worry about large upfront costs for rent or fitting out a space, leaving more time for innovation and entrepreneurism.  

The space you’ll find on spacenow.com is not limited to your usual repertoire of co-working spaces, boardrooms or car parking spots - the categories of space are limited only by your imagination.

We like to refer to ourselves as being pioneers of the activated-space-economy!

Spacenow was founded in 2015.  We are headquartered in Sydney, Australia with offices opening in in Singapore and Dubai very soon.

Name: Kildedal By
Description:
Mellem det åbne land og den tætte by bygger vi Kildedal. I Kildedal har vi en bæredygtig tilgang til livet og naturen. Vi sætter fokus på fællesskabet, dyrker sundheden og inspireres af fremsynede virksomheder med vokseværk. Vi er udkanten af København, men i centrum af livet.

I Kildedal bevarer og styrker vi biodiversiteten og passer godt på naturen. Vi øger naturværdien på den gamle landbrugsjord og forbinder enge, moser og overdrev med en grøn korridor. Vi giver plads til naturen mellem husene og passer på den fredede natur rundt om. Her lever mennesker og dyr side om side.

I vores nye by bidrager vi aktivt til den grønne omstilling. Vi udleder maksimalt 8,5 kg CO2/m2/år i alle bygninger og certificerer med DGNB Guld som minimum. Vi har fyrtårnsprojekter med særligt innovative teknologier eller bæredygtige tiltag. Vi er en varieret by med materialer, der patinerer smukt og har et lavt miljøaftryk. Vi vil være en by i balance.

I Kildedal dyrker vi fællesskabet, nyder naturen og lever et sundt hverdagsliv i bevægelse. Via stiforbindelser bevæger vi os gennem bynaturen ind til bymidten. Her køber vi ind lokalt, nørder natur i naturbasen, får sved på panden i bevægelseshuset eller tager S-toget til København. I Kildedal lever vi det dynamiske hverdagsliv, men har ro på. 

Kildedal er et kraftcenter for life science, biotech og sundhedsteknologi. Her mødes medarbejdere fra hele verden i et mangfoldigt, innovativt miljø med fokus på netværk, synergi og videndeling. I flerbrugerhuse kan små virksomheder vokse sig store, mens etablerede kan lære nyt fra de mange vækstvirksomheder. I Kildedal dyrker vi det sunde arbejdsliv med nem adgang til natur, motion og offentlig transport.

Name: Coop Ejendomme
Description:
I Coop er retail og real estate tæt forbundet. Derfor knokler mere end 70 specialiserede medarbejdere i Coop Ejendomme hver dag på at sikre, at butikkerne i Coop Danmark A/S har de bedst mulige fysiske betingelser og rammer. 

I Coop Ejendomme arbejder vi med alle områder fra køb og salg af ejendomme, udvikling og byg af nye butikker, udvidelser, konverteringer og flytninger af eksisterende butikker, indgåelse af lejekontrakter og etablering af butikken til understøttelse af den efterfølgende drift af bygning og teknik samt energispareprojekter. 

Vi opererer bredt fra strategiske projekter, der bl.a. skal sikre, at Coop i højere grad ejer de ejendomme, hvorfra der drives butikker, til driftsopfølgning for butikkerne i alle kæder. 

Bæredygtighed er desuden et af koncernens største fokusområder og er derfor et vigtigt og bredt spor i arbejdet med vores butiks- og ejendomsportefølje og ved nye investeringer. Coop Ejendomme arbejder fx på to store projekter, hvor der stræbes efter DGNB Guld-certificering: En nybygget Coop 365discount butik på Hvissinge Torv i Glostrup og Coop Byen - en ny, bæredygtig bydel med plads til 4.500 beboere rundt om Coops hovedkontor i Albertslund.

Hvis du vil vide mere om vores spændende rejse, så følg med her på LinkedIn eller på info.coop.dk/kontakt/ejendomme-kontakt/

Name: Spatium
Description:
En Spatium ofrecemos los espacios ideales para mantener el equilibrio y la maximización del funcionamiento de la empresa, conectando con potenciales proveedores y/o clientes de la región. 

El mundo laboral ya no es el mismo, por lo cual estas grandes corporaciones tienen el reto de mantener su identidad corporativa, la productividad de sus colaboradores y la optimización de sus gastos operativos, bajo un esquema híbrido entre el home office y la oficina tradicional. 

Spatium es una empresa creada en el año 2015 en ciudad de Panamá, con el concepto de Centro de Negocios, enfocando la optimización de los costos operativos de pequeñas y medianas empresas. 

En el año 2018 sumamos a la oferta de valor, ofreciendo espacios abiertos de coworking, dirigidos a freelancers, emprendedores y profesionales independientes. 

Posteriormente, en el año 2020 las operaciones se expanden hacia la ciudad de Santo Domingo, República Dominicana, orientando el ofrecimiento de espacios flexibles para multinacionales y brindando espacios de Networking personalizado. 

En este último tiempo nos dimos cuenta que en la nueva realidad post-pandemia, grandes compañías se han visto forzadas a funcionar bajo el sistema de home-office/teletrabajo, teniendo inconvenientes en la cohesión de sus equipos, y en algunos casos perdiendo identidad corporativa. 

El mundo laboral ya no es el mismo, por lo cual estas grandes corporaciones tienen el reto de mantener su identidad corporativa, la productividad de sus colaboradores y la optimización de sus gastos operativos, bajo un esquema híbrido entre el home office y la oficina tradicional. 

Spatium es un Centro de Negocios en el que, gracias a nuestra experiencia, networking y equipo de alto nivel, ofrecemos más que espacios, una alianza estratégica para potenciar la operación de nuestros clientes.

Contáctanos:
Spatium Caracas, Venezuela
Spatium Santo Domingo, República Dominicana: 
ventas@spatiumgroup.com
+18099621311

Réaliser les services avec nos propres collaborateurs, c’est nous donner l’opportunité de créer et d’exploiter les synergies entre les  différentes prestations que nous délivrons. Le développement de la polyvalence des équipes et la montée en compétence des personnes permettent d’optimiser les processus, la gestion des moyens, la qualité de service ainsi que les coûts de production.
Nous connaissons parfaitement les hommes et les femmes qui délivrent nos prestations au quotidien et sommes ainsi en capacité de faire évoluer ou moduler notre solution selon vos besoins et vos enjeux.

IEFM répond aux besoins des clients qui souhaitent se recentrer sur leur cœur de métier et confier les prestations annexes à des experts.

IEFM vous propose une palette de services variés que vous pouvez à tous moment personnaliser en fonction de vos besoins dans le cadre d’un pack facilities qui sera géré et coordonné par nos experts.

Name: ARGENCONS
Description:
Since 1969 Argencons has been developing major ventures and is recognized for its reliability, the security of its proposals, and the widespread reception and esteem given to its innovative products.
At the peak of the 70’s, Argencons takes on the planning of a city block in Palermo bound by Ugarteche, Segui, Scalabrini Ortiz and Cerviño streets, hitting a milestone with the creation and development of the first complex with an infrastructure for security, amenities and leisure (the “luxury building” model used by all today).
In the 90’s—a period marked by economic growth, deregulation, and access to credit—Argencons learned to see the importance of incorporating the latest technology and creating offers tailored to the client, with strong added value, creating the Quartier brand, synonymous with top-notch residential complexes with innovative concepts in quality, service and operations.
In 2003, Argencons begins construction and financing of large residential complexes under the Trust At Cost model, initiating—with Quartier Libertador and Quartier de la India—a method that today has been fully implemented.
It has turned over 17 Quartier Complexes.
At Argencons we work to achieve the highest quality at all stages of development, and, above all, to provide the best service to our clients.
In each one of our projects, we seek solutions that are both original and flexible, allowing us to cater to distinct tastes and needs and attract users and investors from an ample spectrum.

1.	Orchestrate community oriented projects to enhance cultural and urban environment.
2.	Strive to be the leading residential team by achieving architectural excellence with human comfort in mind.
3.	Practice Master Builder principles with a core value emphasizing each individual member embraces full range of responsibilities.
4.	Provide affordable housing components to fulfill social responsibility.
Over the years, we completed five high-rise residential projects in downtown Bellevue. The project currently under construction is a 23 story, 259 units, mixed-use apartment community. 
We are seeking highly motivated, team oriented individuals who enjoy taking hands-on approach to design and construction detailing in a fast paced environment. Excellent verbal, technical and written communication skills are essential. The successful applicant should have a working knowledge of concrete and steel construction methods and detailing. Must have strong organizational skills, ability to give and take direction, and interface well with consultants as well as construction trades.

Our employees are involved in the management and leasing of over 40 shopping centers with space totaling 4,500,000 square feet, 3,100 multifamily units and over 40 office and industrial buildings containing approximately 5,600,000 square feet. The firm also has a construction division and rehab division, which have capabilities ranging from remodeling projects to full–scale project construction. An investment sales division is responsible for the marketing and sale of commercial properties, including raw land. To date, the firm has closed approximately $5 billion of commercial transactions.

Name: Real Estate Network
Description:
Real Estate Network er en professionel netværksgruppe med fokus på alle aspekter af ejendomsbranchen i og omkring Aarhus og København. Medlemmerne af gruppen kan være alt fra banker, investorer, mæglere, administratorer, arkitekter, advokater, entreprenører, ingeniører mv.

Gruppens helt overordnede mål er, at skabe nye relationer samt at styrke de bestående.

Hvorfor vælge Real Estate Network?
Der findes mange professionelle netværk i og omkring Aarhus. Mange af netværksgrupperne er meget formelle med dagsordener og programmer fra gang til gang.

Konceptet er meget uformelt og enkelt. Vi er af den klare overbevisning, at hvis man bringer mennesker tættere sammen i sociale og uformelle sammenhænge, så skaber man tætte og gode relationer. Derfor er omdrejningspunktet for gruppen sociale arrangementer, som eksempelvis middage, vinsmagning, fyraftensøl mv. Der vil selvfølgelig også være fagligt relevante arrangementer løbende. I denne sammenhæng tænker vi hele tiden på, hvordan vi involverer vores medlemmer i arrangementerne og vi gør meget ud af, at tænke ud af boksen og forny os selv.

Ved at vælge vores netværk, får din virksomhed adgang til et anderledes socialt og professionelt netværk, som styrker relationerne på tværs af de forskellige aktører i ejendomsbranchen.

Hvordan bliver din virksomhed medlem?
Vi er altid åbne for nye medlemmer og det eneste kriterie er, at din virksomhed har et fokusområde indenfor ejendomsbranchen. Du kan ansøge om at blive medlem via vores website. Vi behandler typisk ansøgninger indenfor 2-3 arbejdsdage.

Hvordan kan din virksomhed engagere sig?
Alle medlemmer er velkomne til, at komme med input og ideer til løbende udvikling af netværket. Hvis din virksomhed har lyst til, at arrangere relevante indlæg, vise projekter frem, give en virksomhedsrundtur eller lignende, er der også rigtig god mulighed for dette. Alle input, ideer og tiltag til arrangementer bliver løbende evalueret i forhold til relevans, ønsker og interesser i gruppen.

Description:
Founded in 2014 by the Rosenberg family, Pebb Capital is a diversified, multi-strategy real estate and private equity investment firm. The firm invests across the capital stack and focuses on value-oriented and cyclically-defensive investments that generate attractive risk-adjusted returns.

Pebb Capital’s reputation for integrity and creativity has allowed the company to attract and retain a top-tier team of dedicated professionals. The Pebb Capital team has experience in all phases of investment origination, underwriting, acquisitions, financing, management, and reporting. The combined experience of the Pebb Capital team has enabled the company to successfully execute sophisticated and complex investment strategies in an evolving market environment.

Name: Innes Building Consultancy
Description:
OUR STORY

Our success is driven from the lasting relationships we have formed with key clients and our understanding of their business and aspirations. 

We provide advice from pre-acquisition stage right through to disposal and can be involved in all stages in between.

We work with property investors, asset managers, funds and end users across all sectors of the commercial property market.

Our team have expertise in the project management of new build and major refurbishment schemes together with providing strategic advice on individual property or portfolio acquisitions and end of Lease dilapidations for both Landlord and Tenant.

We are fortunate to work with some of the leading property companies in their chosen sector and focus on working hard for them while enjoying what we do.

CAPABILITY STATEMENT

We have advised on property acquisitions in the office, industrial and retail sectors totalling over £450m over the last 5 years across all parts of the UK including individual assets worth in excess of £70m.

Our team have completed major office refurbishments totalling over 500,000sq.ft of CAT A space. We have provided full Project Management and Cost Consultancy services to deliver projects within very challenging timescales to facilitate Tenant occupiers.

We take on an average of 30-40 end of Lease dilapidations negotiations each year acting for both Landlord and Tenant and use our expertise to ensure our clients get the best advice to protect their interests. We work closely with several leading law firms on many of these instructions.

THE FUTURE

Our aim is to continue to grow our business alongside our existing and new clients to meet the needs of an ever changing commercial property market. We see lots of opportunities for hard working and dynamic companies like ourselves to continue to deliver a level of service which sets us apart from others.

Name: CIP Real Estate
Description:
CIP Real Estate (“CIP”) is a full service real estate investment and management company based in Irvine, California, focused on the acquisition, development, repositioning and management of industrial and business parks.  Founded in 1995, CIP has completed more than $1.3 billion in real estate transactions, and owns and manages over 9.2 million square feet of quality real estate throughout California, Nevada, Georgia, Texas, North and South Carolina.

CIP Real Estate’s principals, Eric Smyth and Robert Strom, combined their backgrounds in development, investment, finance, law, management and marketing to create a business that was built on service and driven by results. The Company’s core business plan remains acquiring and creating value in real estate assets and co-investing with institutional partners. In order to implement its business plan, CIP established a $700 million industrial portfolio investment program with New York-based Almanac Realty Investors, LLC. Almanac, a Neuberger Berman company, is a leading provider of growth capital to private and public real estate companies. From the time of its funding in 1981, the group has raised over $6.5 billion related to a wide array of real estate opportunities and committed over $5.2 billion to 43 different companies in North America.

Guided by its founders, the Company’s educated and experienced team of professionals provides institutional level asset management, financial analysis, modeling, due diligence, accounting and financial reporting, as well as a full spectrum of traditional real estate services in property management, leasing and marketing and construction management. CIP’s headquarters are in Irvine, California and the Company has full-service management offices in Riverside, Upland, Las Vegas, Hayward, Atlanta, Charlotte and Dallas.

For further information on CIP Real Estate, please visit www.ciprealestate.com.

Name: Paddington Square
Description:
Paddington Square is a new and design-forward workspace, shopping and dining quarter at the heart of Paddington’s regeneration. 

Owned by Great Western Developments Ltd and managed by Sellar, the visionary developer behind The Shard, Paddington Square has been conceived as a future-optimised, mixed-use development. The building will provide a flexible and inspiring environment, with sustainability and wellbeing at it core, designed as a connected and socially collaborative workspace for progressive industries and future thinkers.  

Set to open later this year, the Renzo Piano Building Workshop designed building will appear to float above the ground floor piazza; a light-filled crystalline building with a rooftop restaurant offering panoramic views of Hyde Park and London. A place with a cultural heart, Paddington Square will also contain four floors of shopping, restaurants and cafes, and 1.35 acres of new civic space, programmed with contemporary art and cultural events.

As a gateway into central London, Paddington Square benefits from Paddington’s national and international transport links, as well as the Elizabeth line accessible by a brand new Bakerloo line station entrance just minutes from the workspace and shops. In addition to the convenience of its connectivity, retail mix and dining experiences, the green spaces and blue waterways surrounding Paddington Square will provide the future community with opportunities to improve individual and collective wellbeing.

Name: Groupe VADIM
Description:
Le Groupe VADIM est une société foncière qui constitue et fait fructifier un portefeuille d’immobilier d’entreprise (locaux de bureaux) et d’exploitation (hôtels, biens para-hôteliers) en le louant ou en l’exploitant
Le Groupe source des projets d’investissement immobiliers, structure le financement d’acquisitions d’immeubles et pilote les travaux de rénovation, de restauration ou de réhabilitation lourde des bâtiments acquis, de la conception du projet jusqu’à la livraison de l’ouvrage. Le patrimoine détenu est ensuite mis en exploitation par les équipes du Groupe VADIM.
Le Groupe VADIM intervient ainsi sur toute la chaine de valeur d’une opération immobilière.
En premier lieu, les équipes de développeurs du Groupe VADIM réalisent un travail intense de sourcing et de développement, en prospectant des fonciers constructibles ou des immeubles à transformer et à restructurer pour créer de la valeur. 
Une fois les actifs identifiés, la Direction des Investissements du Groupe procèdent à leurs acquisitions et structure, en dette et en equity, le financement de l’acquisition. Pour financer ses opérations, VADIM a généralement recours à une dette bancaire et peut, pour la partie fonds propres, créer des Clubs Deals ad hoc. 
Lorsque le Groupe VADIM est titré sur les actifs, c’est la Direction de la Maîtrise d’Ouvrage du Groupe qui, en s’appuyant en interne sur une équipe programme dédiée, pilote l’ensemble du projet, de la conception jusqu’à la livraison de l’ouvrage.
Une fois la transformation de l’actif réalisé, le Groupe VADIM peut alors décider de conserver le bien immobilier dans son patrimoine et le mettre à bail (dans le cas de bureaux) ou en exploitation (dans le cas d’hôtels), ou bien de le vendre à un investisseur ou un utilisateur

Name: USIN Lyon Parilly
