With national expertise and relationships, we are a local firm who applies a nimble, team approach while providing the highest level of service.

Name: Birmingham Business Park
Description:
Birmingham Business Park (BBP) is the most established out of town office park in the Midlands. Set within 148 acres of mature parkland, BBP comprises 2.4m sq ft of high quality office space and is home to more than 150 companies, including Rolls Royce, IMI, Canon, Goodyear, GKN and Changan Automotive, and circa 10,000 employees.

Just minutes from Junction 6 of the M42, the park is perfectly located for easy access to all the major road and motorway networks as well as rail and air links, with Birmingham International Station, Birmingham Airport and the proposed HS2 Interchange within close proximity. Birmingham Business Park also forms part of UK Central (previously known as the M42 Economic Gateway), which supports an estimated 100,000 jobs region-wide and contributes £5.1bn to regional GDP.

Birmingham Business Park offers tenants a range of on site amenities including Greggs, WHSmith, a nursery, and a dry cleaners. A strong commitment to community engagement and health & well-being with a programme of regular events, from yoga classes to running and cycling clubs. Networking events, community clubs and weekly BBP Lunch Club for tenants to network and socialise.

Name: Bespoke Commercial Real Estate
Description:
Bespoke specializes in creating value for privately-held businesses and non-profit organizations. Leveraging deep market knowledge and experience, we find, negotiate, finalize and extend custom real estate solutions that optimally meet clients’ strategic and financial needs today and are customized to fit their goals for the future.

We believe it is a conflict of interest to represent both tenants and landlords since that often means negotiations stop short of the best deal for private companies and non-profit organizations. At Bespoke, we advocate solely for the business success of clients, while earning respect from building owners and management along the way. Serving a diverse group of business leaders, we provide resourceful problem solving and skilled negotiation, along with ongoing strategic counsel to add value for clients long after a lease is inked.

We are experts in: 

•	Analyzing your present and future facility requirements
•	Market analysis and alternative identification
•	Review and selection of facility alternatives
•	Financial analysis and transaction negotiations
•	Facilitating lease reviews with attorneys
•	Monitoring build-out progress to ensure conditions are met
•	Advising on trusted vendors to assist with the transition

Specialties: Office & Warehouse lease negotiations and acquisitions

Name: The Job Seeker
Description:
Garden City is an award-winning mixed-use development in Nairobi, Kenya - the first real estate project of its kind to combine residential, retail and office components into one integrated design. Easily accessible from all parts of Nairobi, Garden City lies on a sprawling 47-acre site, located between Junction 7 and Junction 8 along Thika Super Highway. Since opening in 2015, a new community has been taking shape at Garden City, with 215 apartments and modern family town houses available for sale/rent, alongside one of Kenya’s largest shopping malls. Designed around a 3-acre central park, Garden City Mall is home to the largest and most popular iMax cinema in East Africa, a wide range of restaurants and cafes, and over 100 national and international shops and brands, including the first Game store in Kenya, and Shoprite’s first store - due to open its doors in Q4 2018.

To complete the LIVE, WORK, PLAY experience, the mall is connected by a pedestrian boulevard to Garden City’s Grade A office complex, offering over 12,500sqm of Gross Leasable Area (GLA) spread over 2 new buildings, plus a healthcare facility, two hotels and over 400 mid-market residential units coming soon.

Backed by leading emerging market investor, Actis [https://www.act.is/], Garden City has sustainability at its core and boasts Africa’s biggest solar panelled rooftop parking facility. Winner of the 2017 Best Green Building in Sub-Saharan Africa Award for its retail and residential spaces during the Africa Property Investment Summit & Expo, it will also be the first mixed-use development in East Africa to gain LEED certification, with offices designed and built to IFC Edge Certification standards. Garden City is ‘the perfect mix’.

Name: RJO Conseils et Participations
Description:
Spécialiste depuis plus de 35 ans de la construction de maisons individuelles en Savoie, RJO est une entreprise de promotion immobilière de proximité. Notre savoir-faire repose sur la parfaite connaissance de notre métier, de la recherche d’emplacement à la commercialisation en passant par la gestion intégrale des projets de construction. Notre société à taille humaine a construit son projet sur trois valeurs fortes : 

  * QUALITÉ : La qualité est le fil conducteur de chaque projet réalisé par RJO. Celle-ci se manifeste en premier lieu par le choix des meilleurs emplacements, adaptés aussi bien à l’investissement locatif qu’à l’accession à la propriété. Elle passe ensuite par le soin apporté à la construction en elle-même, grâce à la sélection des meilleurs artisans de la région.

  * CONFIANCE : Valeur fondatrice pour RJO, la confiance se construit aussi bien dans la phase de création du projet si vous choisissez votre logement sur plan, que dans la réalisation de celui-ci jusqu’à son terme. Vous avez également l’opportunité de traiter en direct avec votre promoteur, qui met son expérience à votre service et reste ainsi à l’écoute de vos besoins. Vous économisez également les frais d’intermédiaires superflus.

  * PROXIMITÉ La proximité est une évidence pour RJO. Vivant dans la région, notre équipe en connaît les avantages et les spécificités. Nous vous transmettons toute notre passion en concevant des projets modernes, reflets de vos envies et de notre savoir-faire. RJO vous garantie la qualité de votre investissement, grâce à des projets modernes et ancrés dans les spécificités de notre régio

C’est parce que vous souhaitez…
•	Vendre votre bien rapidement au meilleur prix en fonction de la conjoncture actuelle,
•	Louer votre bien à un locataire apportant de sérieuses garanties et développant un projet durable,
•	Vous installer dans un local, bureau ou entrepôt au bon prix et au bon endroit, 
•	Investir à court, moyen ou long terme avec une forte rentabilité, 

….que nous vous proposons de répondre à vos besoins spécifiques de façon adapté grâce à :
•	L’identification précise de vos besoins,
•	Notre parfaite connaissance du marché de l’immobilier Commerciale et d’entreprise à Marseille et ses environs,
•	Nos nombreux partenaires privilégiés (avocats, établissements bancaires, architectes, experts comptable, notaires, entrepreneur du bâtiment…), que nous ferons intervenir si nécessaire,
•	Notre implication sans faille dans le suivi de votre dossier en assurant en permanence le lien entre tous les acteurs.

La satisfaction de nos clients est en permanence au centre de nos préoccupations.
Franchiseurs, Bailleurs, Asset manager, Investisseurs, Commerçants, Entrepreneurs, vous souhaitez être accompagné par un spécialiste reconnu de l’immobilier commercial et d’entreprise à Marseille et ses environs (Zones commerciales de Plan de Campagne, la Valentine, les Paluds…) ? Name: Modesta Real Estate
Description:
Modesta Real Estate offers support with advice on all questions relating to commercial real estate – equally at national and international levels. The focus is clearly defined: Targeted and integrated solutions that are customer-oriented and lead to profit. 

MG Real Estate GmbH was founded in Vienna in 2002. In addition to the Headquarters in Vienna, a subsidiary company was launched in Bratislava in 2005. Since its foundation year, Modesta Real Estate can look back at a successful company history. A significant share of this success is due to prestigious clients such as AMISOLA, BECHTLE, BFI, BOSCH, HONEYWELL, LOUIS VUITTON, MONDI AG, MOUNTPARK, PHILIPS, PROLOGIS, SIEMENS, SIGNA, USAA and WOLSELEY. In recent years, millions of sqm of office, industrial and logistics space as well as development sites have successfully been completed. Beside the domestic markets in Austria and Slovakia, Modesta Real Estate also assists in numerous transactions in the CEE markets and supports its international partners with corporate real estate advice. The Managing Partners Andreas Polak-Evans, SIOR, and Sebastian Scheufele, SIOR, have more than 15 years of exclusively, commercial real estate experience. 

Modesta Real Estate is an expert in finding investment properties, offices, logistics, industrial and commercial real estate in Austria or the CEE region, together with the subsequent location analyses and contract negotiations. Modesta Real Estate also offers professional advisory and valuations, corporate real estate services as well as the implementation of highly efficient marketing strategies for existing properties. With their in-depth knowledge, they help clients to make the right decisions regarding property specific questions. Modesta Real Estate’s network extends from the two office locations in Vienna and Bratislava across Austria and the CEE region and consists of European and American investment companies and private investors.

Description:
Aron prides himself on being available, and directly contactable by his owners, giving them the peace of mind that they know exactly what's happening with their assets at all times.

As custodians of your asset, we aim to do these things exceptionally well, therefore giving you more time to do the things that are important to you.
 
Our model is unique, we don't lease or sell, we just manage. We work alongside all the majors inc CBRE, Colliers, Cushman Wakefield, JLL etc and all of the smaller, boutique single agency groups as well. Name: GVZ Europark Coevorden-Emlichheim GmbH
Description:
Op de grens van Nederland en Duitsland, tussen Coevorden en Emlichheim, ligt het bedrijventerrein GVZ Europark. De combinatie van de perfecte logistieke mogelijkheden, de variabele bouwkavels en het uitstekende prijs/kwaliteitsniveau, maakt bedrijventerrein GVZ Europark een interessante vestigingslocatie voor bestaande en nieuwe ondernemers!

Het bedrijventerrein GVZ Europark onderscheidt zich door zijn logistieke mogelijkheden per spoor, weg en water. Uniek aan dit bedrijventerrein is de strategische ligging op de Duitse-Nederlandse grens, tussen Coevorden en Emlichheim. Dit betekent directe toegang tot de Nederlandse én de Duitse markt. Inmiddels zijn er al veel succesvolle bedrijven gevestigd op het GVZ Europark. Het bedrijventerrein is in totaal 350 hectare groot. Er is nog ruimte beschikbaar voor meerdere nieuwe vestigingen. Er zijn ruime mogelijkheden in bouw, kavelgrootte en milieuklasse in een aantrekkelijke werkomgeving, dus ook bedrijven met een grote ruimtebehoefte vinden hier een geschikte kavel. Bovendien zijn er uitstekende mogelijkheden voor duurzame energievoorzieningen. 

Vanwege de aanwezige infrastructuur en het brede aanbod van diverse voorzieningen is het Europark bijzonder geschikt voor logistieke bedrijven en voor logistiek afhankelijke industrieën. De Duitse en Nederlandse spoornetten komen hier bijeen op de openbare railterminal Euroterminal Coevorden. Het spoor sluit bovendien direct aan op de naastgelegen haven. En op korte afstand van de autowegen A37/E233 en A31.

Dit verklaart tevens de formele GVZ-status (GüterVerkehrsZentrum) van het Europark.

Name: JMP Expansion SA
Description:
Une histoire et un patrimoine à votre service

Nous partageons depuis 35 ans la vie du commerce, une histoire de lieu, d’échanges, de réciprocité...
La pratique du terrain nous a permis d’envisager l’ensemble de la dimension marchande et de ses exigences. 
Des engagements comme le service, la convivialité, l’attention et la relation aux autres, nous ont poussé à développer des projets pertinents.
L’expertise de chacun de nos collaborateurs est de mettre en oeuvre ces derniers, cette dynamique à taille humaine nous place comme acteur référent de l‘immobilier commercial en France.
Le monde a changé radicalement ces dernières années. La place du Commerce et de l’individu consommateur est bouleversée. Pour y répondre, notre parti pris est clair : placer l’individu citoyen au cœur de nos conceptions, pour garantir une réponse porteuse de sens sociétale et génératrice de lien.
Un de nos engagements fort la protection de l’environnement : apporter une réponse sur mesure aux différents enjeux de la société et aux objectifs des collectivités locales, comme la durabilité de nos projets indissociable de la dimension  environnementale. Désormais nos projets sont développés  visant une certification BREEAM ou HQE.
Enfin afin de répondre au mieux aux exigences du marché, à la volonté des élus et à la diversification du territoire, nous nous orientons vers plus de mixité dans le choix et la réalisation de nos projets. 
JMP Expansion aménage des espaces d’habitation intégrant une programmation mixte avec commerces, logements, institutions, résidences collectifs pour personnes âgées, crèches …
Pour répondre aux besoins sociétaux et économiques du marché de la maison individuelle, JMP Expansion développe son savoir-faire en lotissement et se positionne aujourd'hui également en tant qu'aménageur.
Notre conviction est que le travail effectué aujourd’hui écrit l’histoire de demain, travail toujours géré avec le même bon sens et la même passion depuis 35 ans.

Name: Seven Square by Kapset
Description:
Seven Square est le nouveau fleuron architectural du groupe Kapset conçu en superposition bureaux-hôtel. Situé en plein cœur de Casablanca à l’angle du boulevard Sidi Abderrahman et à proximité de Casablanca Finance City (CFC), l’immeuble nouvelle génération Seven Square a été pensé pour proposer aux futurs locataires une qualité de vie professionnelle aux standards internationaux et à la hauteur de leurs aspirations.

Doublement certifié WELL et HQE, Seven Square est le seul immeuble bureaux-hôtel Casablancais qui répond à un double enjeu: celui d’un projet mixte, muti-usage, fonctionnel et répondant parfaitement aux attentes du marché et aux nouvelles tendances mondiales, et celui de la volonté de proposer une œuvre architecturale équilibrée, singulière et dédiée au bien-être des futurs locataires au cœur de Casablanca.

Un défi accepté et relevé par les équipes et partenaires de Kapset qui, animés par la volonté d’innover et faire différemment, ont proposé une architecture qui répartit les composantes du projet verticalement sur 7 étages autour d’un espace central végétalisé, le tout, avec un style architectural contemporain.
 
- Au Rez-de-chaussée: les services corporatifs et commerces, salles de conférence et restaurants
- Aux 4 premiers étages: 13 000 m2 de plateaux bureaux
- Aux 3 derniers étages: un hôtel et un rooftop avec une vue imprenable sur Casablanca.

Faites partie d’un projet novateur conçu « Like Nowhere Else » au cœur de Casablanca.

Réservez votre rendez-vous au 05 22 94 94 04

Name: Strategic Asset Services
Description:
Strategic Asset Services was formed with the goal of elevating the quality of annual lender property inspections as a collateral monitoring tool. The company has been providing superior property inspections to the industry since 1997. With training programs, strong supervision, and perspectives gained through the extensive outsourcing services provided by the experienced professionals of SPA, SAS uniquely understands the needs of the various end users of inspection reports. For annual compliance, lender assumption underwriting, disbursement reviews, watch-list criteria, and default management, our inspection reports are thorough, providing maximum utility, information, and accuracy. 

Due to our stellar track record in meeting deadlines and our consistent report quality, many of our clients who rank among the leaders of the industry, have chosen SAS as their exclusive inspection vendor. We not only provide timely and consistent reports on key property and market characteristics to determine the property's current condition, but we also specifically identify issues that may adversely impact future revenue and provide red flag alerts requiring additional client review. The quality of our inspections is a direct result of the high caliber of individuals at SAS.

Incorporated in 1928, the Oklahoma City Association of Building Owners and Managers represents and promotes the interests of the commercial real estate industry through leadership, education, advocacy, information and networking.  Currently, our real estate members represent over 37 million square feet of commercial property in the central Oklahoma area.

BOMA Oklahoma City fosters cooperation among all who are interested in the management and ownership of real estate, particularly owners and managers of commercial office, corporate, government, institutional, medical, loft or apartment buildings and shopping centers.

BOMA Oklahoma City promotes the professional and educational growth of members through the exchange of ideas of interest in the construction, maintenance, management and ownership of commercial real estate, including legislation, taxation, insurance and other matters of public interest.

BOMA Oklahoma City works to improve the conditions pertaining to the ownership, management and operation of commercial real estate.  BOMA OKC is the spokesman for members in matters affecting development, ownership and operation of commercial real estate and make representations to the various offices of government in that respect.

Name: Vicus Partners, LLC
Description:
Vicus Partners, LLC is a full-service commercial real estate firm that exclusively represents tenants in commercial transactions. We provide consultative and advisory services to our clients whether they are relocating to new space, restructuring an existing lease, or expanding within their current location. Our detail-oriented approach allows us to take on the entire process of finding the best space for a client and negotiating all lease points to help achieve bottom-line results.

We only represent tenants. Vicus never acts as a landlord’s agent. Why? So we can act as our client’s unwavering advocate, free of the conflicts of interest that are inevitable when attempting to represent both landlord and tenant. Since the lease negotiation process is oppositional in nature, this freedom is crucial in serving a tenant’s best interest.

Identifying the right space and securing the best lease terms requires broad market knowledge and a sharp business sense. We deploy our deep knowledge of the market to negotiate to our client’s best advantage. What’s more, we can put together the right team of lawyers, design and construction consultants, engineers and contractors to help complete the transaction.

We are real estate brokers, consultants and advisors to our clients. Our plan of action, based on the input we receive and the options we assemble, will impact our client’s financial well-being for years to come.

Name: Prop.Exchange
Description:
Prop.Exchange, powered by TrueMarketValue, is a digital auction platform for trading commercial real estate properties; it's where supply meets demand. The purpose of this digital tool is to efficiently trade properties at the true market value - and in a time efficient manner.

The challenge we are solving:
•	Property valuations can be uncertain; often there are only few relevant comparables
•	Running costs can be a burden – Taxes, reporting, maintenance, security, etc. are wasteful
•	Selling has been time consuming and frustrating – historically there was no easy solutions without compromising good governance

Our solution; 3 easy steps:
1.	Preparations – Due Diligence material/essential documents and the SPA are added to our data room
2.	Marketing of the property in newspapers and virtual
3.	Digital auction – Divestment by Dutch Auction on prop.exchange

The Dutch Auction is characterized by a descending price, starting at index 100 and decrease by e.g. 1 point every weekday at noon until a bidder accepts the price offered or until seller decides to rather keep the property. 

Once a bidder accepts a price offered, the bidder has 2-5 business days to sign the Purchase Offer/SPA and pay a reasonable deposit. If bidder fails to perform he becomes disqualified from this and future auctions - and the auction will resume for everybody else. 
Interested bidders can access relevant data, drawings and the applicable contracts after log-on and qualification for the auction.

Value for buyers: 
•	All buyers have access to same information 
•	The auction takes out the “bluffing” of the negotiation 
•	No bias or disadvantage due to lacking relationship 
•	You don't have to pay more than you think the property is worth

Value for sellers:
•	It's very time efficient
•	Determines and documents the true market value
•	Sales complexity, cost and time are significantly reduced 

For more info please contact: 

Allan Kehlet Rieck 
Founder

+45 21 79 01 59
allan@prop.exchange

Name: Federación de Asociaciones Inmobiliarias (FAI)
Description:
El 4 de marzo del año 2013 nacía la Federación de Asociaciones Inmobiliarias (FAI), como resultado del manifiesto previo, suscrito por representantes de ocho asociaciones locales inmobiliarias de diferentes puntos de España en noviembre 2012. La vocación de esta Federación, creada por y para los inmobiliarios, ha sido actuar como coordinadora de las asociaciones que la integran, canalizando de forma ágil las demandas, la experiencia y la fuerza de sus asociaciones adheridas, con una estructura MÍNIMA y SIMPLIFICADA que la dote de TRANSPARENCIA y EFICACIA.

En la actualidad, FAI está integrada por 16 asociaciones inmobiliarias, lo que representa unas 800 agencias y un colectivo de 3.000 agentes inmobiliarios.

Entre sus FINES, destacan los siguientes:

FOMENTAR la creación y el desarrollo de las asociaciones inmobiliarias orientadas a la colaboración mediante mandatos en exclusiva compartida (MLS), así como la profesionalización de sus agencias asociadas. 
FACILITAR la transferencia eficaz de información sobre inmuebles, procesos, sistemas y todo tipo de proveedores necesarios. 
REPRESENTAR a sus organizaciones asociadas ante terceros, influyendo en legislación y normativas que hagan crecer de forma sostenible el sector inmobiliario, en los ámbitos geográficos e instancias que correspondan. 

Y para su consecución, varias han sido las ACTIVIDADES puestas en marcha a lo largo de estos años. Entre ellas, resaltan las siguientes:

Creación de comisiones de trabajo que propongan a la Asamblea acciones concretas encaminadas a la consecución de los fines. Las comisiones estarán formadas, al menos, por un miembro de la Junta Directiva, que actuará como coordinador, y un máximo de tres personas más. 
Creación de imagen corporativa, así como diseño, puesta operativa y actualización de una página Web de la Federación con contenidos y documentación práctica para las asociaciones integrantes.
Creación de un Foro de discusión profesional abierto, tanto online como presencial, sobre el futuro de la profesión de Agente Inmobiliario, que proponga acciones encaminadas a dar valor y notoriedad al ejercicio profesional.
Organización de una Mesa Inmobiliaria, con representantes de todos los colectivos de agentes inmobiliarios, para consensuar propuestas comunes sobre el mercado de la vivienda, compraventa o alquiler, y en especial en los ámbitos de accesibilidad, fiscalidad y financiación.

Ghassan has been ranked 'number one' as a gold supplier in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia with gold trading turnover of SR13.476bn ($3.6bn) for fiscal year 2008.

In line with the Kingdom's policy of encouraging the indigenous work force, 70% of GHG employees are Saudis, who have been rigorously trained to cope with the needs and requirements of their work.

In addition to the gold and jewellery business, the group has diversified portfolio with interests; in real estate, financial investments, general contracting, trading in electronics, hardware, manufacturing of wooden furniture & fixtures and heavy transport business. GHG is a significant player in the transportation business and owns some 200 heavy commercial vehicles.

Name: CRESNIA
Description: We are Cresnia, a company dedicated to advancing business in Sweden through the effective utilization of office strategy as a powerful business tool. Our enthusiasm stems from a firm conviction that a well-designed office, strategically planned, holds the potential to enhance the overall value of a workspace. Each strategically planned office incorporated into our portfolio signifies heightened success for businesses in Sweden, which is why we are deeply committed to our work.

Name: Currie Project Management, LLC
Description: Currie Project Management is a full-service Owners Project Management firm that specializes in helping clients navigate and manage complex corporate real estate projects from inception to completion.

Name: Quatuor Transactions
Description:
Quatuor est votre partenaire depuis 20 ans dans la transmission d’exploitations agricoles sur le Grand Ouest de la France.

 Acteur de la réussite de vos projets », plus qu’un slogan, c’est la philosophie de Quatuor Transactions qui accompagne les transmissions d’exploitations agricoles dans l’Ouest de la France. Avec plus de 650 transactions depuis 2004, nous sommes le leader incontesté sur notre secteur d’activité, avec un objectif permanent de qualité et de satisfaction de nos clients.

Créée par 4 associés spécialistes du monde agricole, Quatuor Transactions c’est aujourd’hui une équipe de plus de 25 collaborateurs qui vous accompagne dans vos projets d’installations et de transmissions. Nous sommes animés par une passion indéfectible pour notre métier. Contribuer au renouvellement des générations en agriculture est pour nous une source de fierté et d'accomplissement.

Name: Tópate
Description:
Bump into professionals like you! Made by entrepreneurs for entrepreneurs; Tópate is one of the oldest shared offices in the country (founded in 2014).

Join our community and will send you regular information regarding the market and the business development of the country.

We are a shared office space, made by entrepreneurs, for entrepreneurs and companies.

We offer spaces full of pleasant faces, good vibes, and a familiar and kind service. We are not a chain where you will be one more. For us, you will always be special and unique.

Your company will have fully furnished, comfortable, central, close spaces, where we all know each other and try to collaborate to support us in our growth.

You can rent completely flexible, tailor-made spaces or offices 24x7. 

Meeting rooms are included when you rent an office, with no need to pay extra to use them to a fair extent.

When you're ready to grow and expand the space you use, we'll be by your side to support you in your growth by providing more space with all the flexibility you need.

Name: Weichert Commercial Brokerage
Description: Weichert Commercial Brokerage, Inc. is a leading commercial brokerage company with offices throughout New Jersey .  Weichert Commercial consistently delivers the highest quality real estate services through its office, industrial, retail, investment, tenant representation and commercial land brokerage divisions.  Weichert Commercial is a proud member of the CORE network, a national network of select commercial real estate companies providing a full line of commercial real estate services to its member clients.  During the past ten years NJ Biz Magazine has ranked Weichert Commercial in the top commercial real estate companies in NJ and CoStar Group, Inc. has ranked it in the Top Power Brokers in New Jersey since 2002.

Name: Arena Centar Zagreb
Description:
Arena Centar - The fulfilling world for the most demanding ones 

Arena Centar is a leader in the Croatian shopping centre market hosting over 200 stores, including numerous international fashion brands such as the global retailers Inditex (with 6 stores) and H&M, as well as over 100 other fashion brands. The tenant mix includes an Interspar hypermarket, international food brands including Burger King, KFC and McDonald’s, many other international brands like Apple, Hewlett-Packard, Old Wild West, Lego, Pandora, Samsonite, Sony, Swarovski and many others. The centre also features a Cinestar Multiplex Cinema with the first IMAX cinema in the region and the 4DX Exclusive Samsung cinema. Arena Centar has seen year by year growth since its opening in 2010, attracting more visitors and tenants each year. Arena Centar has also become a part of the destination experience of Zagreb for all tourists who come to the city during the year. 

Find more information at our website  www.arenacentar.hr

Name: Cruzan
Description: Cruzan is a vertically integrated owner-operator focused on acquiring and repositioning commercial real estate assets throughout the West Coast. Cruzan’s focus is on the transformation of flex/R&D, office, or industrial assets into market leaders. This is achieved through redevelopment, repositioning, management, leasing, and an aggressive operational/amenity push. Cruzan currently owns and operates 18 assets across property types totaling approximately 2.6 million square feet, with offices in Los Angeles and San Diego.

Name: PITground
Description:
Een duurzame, multifunctionele en toekomstgerichte plek. Centraal gelegen in Limburg. PITground draagt bij aan bedrijvigheid, de invulling aan recreatie in de Westelijke Mijnstreek én creëert nieuwe woonbestemmingen.

Het hart van het complex is de plek waar de faciliteiten van alle gebruikers 
van deze locatie samenkomen. Dit maakt PITground een dynamische ontmoetingsplek waar nieuwe connecties en ideeën ontstaan!

Name: L3 Corporation
Description: L3 Corporation is a leading retail commercial brokerage firm specializing in tenant representation, landlord representation and property acquisition and disposition.  Members of L3 Corporation have brought deals to fruition in excess of 35,000,000 square feet spanning over 100 cities throughout the United States and Canada.

Name: Cushman & Wakefield | Ottawa
Description: Our transaction professionals are active in every area of Ottawa, optimally positioning and marketing commercial properties and uncovering hidden opportunities for clients. Supported by our city wide search research, our real estate professionals provide clients with detailed market intelligence, making every recommendation a local one.

Name: Tanglewood Property Group
Description:
Headquartered in Houston, Texas, Tanglewood Property Group has carved a reputation as a leader in property investment and management for over 30 years.

We understand the value of an investment and our operational and ownership experience allows us to profitably manage across many property asset classes.

We strive to ensure that all our tenants receive the highest levels of customer service and value, enabling them to focus on their core business. Tanglewood Property Group works closely with the brokerage community, including Cushman & Wakefield, CBRE, JLL, NAI Houston, Transwestern, Cresa Houston, Newmark Knight Frank, Stream Realty, Colliers International, to name a few. Much of our success stems from local real estate brokers who work closely with our leasing team.

Tanglewood Property Group believes a key factor to our historical and continued success is the company’s adherence to identifying and continuously improving value for each property that we own, operate and lease.

Name: Ladies in CRE
Description: Ladies in CRE  began in 2012 with approximately 35 members. The first event was hosted by Stream Realty and Spire Realty with the purpose to help cultivate personal and professional relationships among the many young women in the commercial real estate industry through holding quarterly networking events. After much interest by attendees to host future events, it has since grown to 300+ members. Ladies in CRE  has exceeded expectations becoming a networking catalyst for many both professionally and personally. We are now taking the organization to the next level by developing this group into more than a networking happy hour but a brand and essential tool we will use in our community and industry for years to come. We organize events where our members can give-back to our local community by connecting with various non-profits and causes. Our goal is to broaden our platform to help women grow personally and professionally.

Name: Media Park
Description: Het Media Park is hét mediahart van Nederland. Hier vloeien traditionele en digitale media moeiteloos in elkaar over. Bevlogen start-ups werken zij aan zij met professionele mediabedrijven en grote omroepen. Maar liefst 6.000 mediaprofessionals, specialisten, creatieven, presentatoren, technici, liefhebbers en visionairs werken hier aan alles wat we dagelijks in de media zien en horen. Samen vormen zij een professionele en levendige community en daarmee het kloppend hart van het park. Het Media Park biedt een prettige en productieve werkomgeving en doet er alles aan om haar bewoners te ontzorgen en te faciliteren. Dat doen we met een professionele en persoonlijke service, het bieden van laatste technieken en middelen en moderne faciliteiten en een breed aanbod aan boeiende activiteiten en evenementen.

Name: ZenTeq
Description:
Zenteq is a specialist community scheme service provider offering holistic management capabilities and administrative support to the property industry. Zenteq offers a fresh, revolutionary take on the typical property management structures, enabling higher levels of service and expertise coupled with even greater customer interaction and scheme support.

New community scheme legislation came into effect in October 2016 which has significantly changed the landscape for all role players, this from scheme executives to the managing agents that service them and the greater community scheme market. Under the new legislation, scheme executives, and by extension property management professionals, are held to a much higher standard of care in conducting the affairs of a communal living scheme.

Zenteq is ideally placed to provide, and so support, with the requisite skill and capacity allowing you to focus on the management of your valued clients leveraging off Zenteq’s economies of scale and expertise and associated scheme affiliate partners.

Name: Knight Frank New Zealand
Description:
There’s a human element in the world of property that is too easily overlooked.

At Knight Frank we build long-term relationships, which allow us to provide personalised, clear and considered advice on all areas of property in all key markets. We believe personal interaction is a
crucial part of ensuring every client is matched to the property that suits their needs best – be it commercial or residential.

Operating in locations where our clients need us to be, we provide a worldwide service that’s locally expert and globally connected.

We believe that inspired teams naturally provide excellent and dedicated client service. Therefore, we’ve created a workplace where opinions are respected, where everyone is invited to contribute to the success of our business and where they’re rewarded for excellence. The result is that our people are more motivated, ensuring your experience with us is the best that it can be.

Our New Zealand based teams in Auckland and Christchurch are dedicated to providing world class advice to all of our international and kiwi clients. Knight Frank New Zealand is world-class quality, with a kiwi focus.

Name: Punto Valle
Description:
En Punto Valle, queremos que cada visita sea una experiencia memorable. Vive el concepto Town Center y encuentra en un mismo lugar, el entretenimiento que buscas, las mejores marcas y la más selecta gastronomía, mientras compartes momentos únicos con aquellos que más quieres. Experimenta el Town Center, tu nuevo punto de reunión.

Un espacio diferente en México, construido sobre un eje tecnológico y diseño arquitectónico vanguardista. Compuesto por los más exclusivos comercios de diversas categorías de productos, entretenimiento y alojamiento; creando experiencias únicas para sus sentidos en cada visita.

Bienvenido al nuevo punto de reunión. Bienvenido a Punto Valle, el nuevo Town Center de San Pedro.
Location: San Pedro Garza García, Nuevo León

Name: Bila Tserkva Industrial Park
Description:
Bila Tserkva Industrial Park is an optimal integrated solution for establishing a cost-effective and secure business model for manufacturers.

Our residents will enjoy access to large consumer, education, and labor markets in Ukraine, as well as convenient logistic and developed infrastructure. Industrial park saves you time and financial resources.

Bila Tserkva Industrial Park offers a built-to-suit solution for establishing manufacturing that includes industrial land available for sale or lease, developed infrastructure with a complex utilities supply, good location with a skilled and cost-effective workforce, experience of the leading Ukrainian real estate developer with a local expertise and optional co-investment.

Name: Biznes Zone
Description: Biznes Zone to ogólnopolska inicjatywa skupiająca przedsiębiorców w przyjaznych, sprzyjających współpracy i networkingowi przestrzeniach biurowych. Udostępniamy biura serwisowane, biura dla startupów, umożliwiamy coworking oraz hot desking.

Name: NAI Norwood Group
Description:
NAI Norwood Group is an affiliate of NAI Global, the world’s leading managed network of independently owned commercial real estate brokerage firms.  Through this network of 325 offices in 55 countries, NAI Norwood Group is able to leverage their strong local experience around the world. Whether your commercial real estate needs require local expertise, or you need brokerage consulting around the world, the firm is here to help. With our extensive background and strong local contacts, we are able to assist individual corporations in negotiating leases, sales, business brokerage, investments, relocation, site selection and development.
 
Founded in 1968 by Karl Norwood, The Norwood Group became one of the largest real estate firms in the State of New Hampshire.  The company expanded into residential land development and home construction in the seventies and formed Norwood Group International, focusing on attracting foreign investors to form joint ventures in commercial real estate, primarily in the New England marketplace. In 2008 NAI Norwood Group opened a second location in Portsmouth, NH vastly widening services into the seacoast area. NAI Norwood Group has remained a viable leader in the commercial real estate field and has continued to hone its skills in this evolving world of sophisticated clients who demand services in dealing with the complexity of the current global market.
 
NAI Norwood Group offers a range of services to clients that include landlord representation,    tenant/buyer representation, business brokerage, consulting, and development. NAI Norwood Group’s affiliation with NAI Global enhances the services by spanning resources on a worldwide level.

Name: DC Vastgoed
Description: DC Vastgoed bestaat sinds 1993 en is uitgegroeid tot een landelijk opererende vastgoedmaatschappij gericht op het ontwikkelen en exploiteren van commercieel vastgoed en woningen.

Name: FC Group
Description:
FC Group represent landlords, tenants, owners, and occupiers in commercial real estate, and operates as a collective team of experts working towards a common goal - to serve the client. Our methodologies have been proven to lower client costs and increase project efficiencies without sacrificing quality.

How and where people work has changed.  People want to Work Local and stay closer to home.  FC Group is working with municipalities/towns/cities to help them capture business before it leaves. We need to focus on new strategies that support more smaller suburban work spaces.  

Multifamily developments provide a good opportunity to achieve this.  Adding a place to "work" with the typical places to "live" and "play" will also increase community sustainability.  Let's Work Local.

Name: Mid-Atlantic CCIM Chapter
Description:
Our mission is to elevate our members to the highest level of commercial real estate success through education, technology, and networking. 

The CCIM designation is elite - CCIM’s have a competitive edge and earn twice as much as other commercial real estate professionals.

Name: The WRKSPCE
Description: The WRKSPCE is an office space provider located at the heart of central business districts and top tourist destinations in the Philippines. It offers a modern and conducive working environment that caters to the needs of freelancers and entrepreneurs who look for flexibility and companies which need a private space for their growing team.

Name: Parque Logístico San Juan
Description:
Parque Logístico San Juan nuclea a empresas de diversos rubros en un punto estratégico ubicado en ruta 101, el principal corredor logístico del país. 

 Depósito arrendado: 2.500 m² aptos para todo tipo de industrias (incluyendo industria farmacéutica y alimentos) con oficinas y vestuarios de más de 300 m².
 Venta de lotes completa: Desde 3.000 m² hasta 27.000 m² adaptable a las necesidades del usuario. FOS del 65% 
*Aplica para proyecto de inversión – COMAP

Consultanos por lotes disponibles para arrendamiento.

Name: Tree of Knowledge (TOK) Sunshine Coast
Description:
What is the Tree of Knowledge?

The Tree of Knowledge (TOK) is a free informal quarterly networking event for people who operate in the property, construction and affiliated industries. TOK events are held in Sunshine Coast, Brisbane, Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Canberra & Newcastle. 

Events are generally held on a Wednesday between 5.30 – 8.30 pm in a public bar, hotel, pub or similar where attendees are able to purchase food and beverage at their leisure and own expense.

Name: Treystar
Description: Treystar is a relationship-driven, Michigan-based, diversified real estate investment company specializing in the development and management of retail shopping centers and office buildings within the greater Kalamazoo market. Our team strives to create the perfect business spaces for our clients. Locate. Partner. Grow.

Description:
