Name: Bajío Industrial Park
Description:
Adjacent to the recently inaugurated Mazda manufacturing facility in Salamanca, Guanajuato, Bajio Industrial park offers industrial land for sale, as well as state of the art inventory and build to suit industrial buildings and warehouses for sale and lease.
Bajio Industrial Park has an exceptional location between Salamanca and Irapuato, with direct overpass access to the interstate 45 highway, offers its customers world class infrastructure and design.
Additionally, a retail area and business class hotel are currently under development to provide an efficient work environment for our customers.
 
Location:        Bajío Industrial Park is strategically located on highway 45 between Salamanca and Irapuato on the main industrialcorridor in the state of Guanajuato.
 
Highway Access:        Direct four lane overpass access to highway 45

Name: AXI IMMO Group
Description:
AXI IMMO Group is one of the leading real estate agencies in Poland, offering complex services to the commercial real estate market. 
The company is known for its strong presence in logistics and industrial sector, but its range of services covers a wider spectrum: leasing of retail and office space, property management services as well as participation in land acquisition and disposal processes.

AXI IMMO brokers provide complex consultancy and services in following areas:
•	warehouse leasing advisory and brokerage
•	retail leasing advisory and brokerage within searching for small retail centres and high street retail space
•	office advisory and brokerage 
•	sale and acquisition of investment plots, due diligence
•	investment advisory 
•	project management for industrial and retail construction.

Name: Brasa Capital Management
Description:
Brasa Capital Management is a real estate investment firm that invests in multifamily, office, industrial and retail projects in the Western US and Texas.  The firm’s primary focus is making disciplined investments in targeted markets where our experience and asset management expertise can enhance returns by actively managing the real estate to unlock value at the asset level.  We focus on select product types and geographies to invest using a fundamental value approach. Our team has extensive market knowledge and networks to source these unique value-creation opportunities.

Brasa targets investments of $5-25MM per transaction through joint venture equity, mezz financing or preferred equity.

Name: RKF
Description: The leading independent real estate firm in North America specializing in retail leasing, investment sales and consulting services, RKF serves a broad spectrum of domestic and global clients in services ranging from national tenant and owner representation to advisory, consulting and dispositions. With approximately $20 billion in aggregate real estate transactions to its credit, RKF has been responsible for identifying scores of real estate opportunities throughout the United States for leading American and international chains, retailers, developers and institutional clients. RKF is headquartered in New York with offices in Chicago, Las Vegas, Los Angeles, Miami, Northern New Jersey, San Francisco and Toronto.

Name: GTC Kenya
Description:
The Global Trade Center in Nairobi, Kenya, is an ultimate premium city complex in East Africa, surrounded by world class resources and developed with a global vision at the thriving city’s superior location.

Touted as “A Landmark by day, A Lighthouse at night”, itcombines together a 603-ft(184-m) office tower, the JW Marriott Luxury 5 Star Hotel, an opulent apartment community and a boutique mall into a brand new city landmark. It sets multiple records by being the city complex with the largest capacity, highest standards and most diversified trade sectors in Kenya, introducing a one-stop upscale ecosystem that meets the business, residential, social and consumption demands of the elite circles of Nairobi. 

Situated in Westlands, the heart of Nairobi’s emerging central business district, you will encounter the future of a great city at the Global trade Center, East Africa's Landmark that defines the future!

Name: Lee & Associates Vancouver
Description:
Throughout the past five decades, our team of real estate professionals has represented buyers and sellers as well as landlords and tenants alike in the primary asset classes of industrial sales and leasing, retail sales and leasing, office leasing, land sales, and investment sales.

We believe that developing long-term relationships with our clients is key to our mutual success.  This principle combined with our extensive experience and market knowledge allows Lee & Associates Vancouver to truly add value and meet the needs of our clients.

Lee & Associates is a commercial real estate brokerage, management and appraisal services firm. Established in 1979, Lee & Associates has grown its service platform to include offices in the United States and Canada. Every Lee & Associates office delivers world class service to an array of regional, national and international clients - from small businesses and local investors to major corporate users and institutional investors. Our professionals combine the latest technology, resources and market intelligence with their experience, expertise and commitment to superior service to optimize your results. The Vancouver office is Lee & Associates’ first location in Canada.

Name: Drake Development, LLC
Description: Drake Development is a full-service commercial real estate development group located in Overland Park, KS. The company is actively engaged in all phases of the development process including site selection, acquisition, site planning, leasing, construction and investment sales. Our experience encompasses neighborhood centers, single-tenant buildings, strip centers, big box retail, entertainment districts, and lifestyle centers. We are actively involved in developments throughout the Midwest region.

Name: PLP
Description:
Specialist developer, manager and owner of UK logistics and industrial properties

Established in 2015, PLP is a specialist UK logistics and industrial property business. The full service platform develops, manages and owns prime-grade UK logistics and industrial properties with in-house management expertise across all key capabilities including acquisitions and sourcing, development, leasing and asset management.

The PLP senior management team has on average over 21 years’ experience in the UK logistics and industrial sector and the platform has successfully developed over 6.1 million sq ft of UK logistics assets.  Leveraging its extensive sector experience, PLP aims to provide its capital partners and occupiers with best-in-class solutions including exclusive access to Peel Group’s strategic land bank.

Website:	www.plproperty.com
Twitter:	@PLPropUK

Name: MacKenzie Companies
Description: The MacKenzie Companies (MacKenzie) possess the multi-disciplined team necessary to excel in Maryland’s corporate real estate community. Comprising seven firms, MacKenzie provides clients a competitive, full-service platform of offerings in leasing, sales, investment sales, tenant and landlord advisory services, corporate and business consulting, commercial and residential development, general construction, property and asset management, debt and equity capital placement, and market research.  With more than 150 employees and offices in Annapolis, Baltimore, Columbia, Bel Air, and Lutherville, Maryland, MacKenzie is one of the largest full service commercial real estate firms in the Mid-Atlantic.

Name: Corscale Data Centers
Description: Corscale specializes in developing energy-efficient, sustainable data centers that enable our hyperscale customers to reliably innovate the digital world.

Name: Baker Katz
Description: Baker Katz is one of Houston’s top full-service retail brokerage firms specializing in first-class tenant representation for some of the retail industry’s top national chains. The firm also provides project development, leasing, and investment sales. With over 150 national tenants since inception, over 15 restaurant chains represented and more than 80 development projects completed, Baker Katz is an established organization dedicated to long-term customer, relationship satisfaction and value in the commercial real estate market.

Name: Brantford India
Description:
Brantford India is a technology-driven real estate marketing platform built to empower developers, channel partners, and property businesses across India. We help them grow faster, market smarter, and compete more effectively in every market.

We believe success in real estate goes beyond just transactions; it’s about building a trusted brand that captures attention, earns buyer confidence, and creates sustainable growth.

With deep industry knowledge and modern tools, Brantford makes marketing simpler, more effective, and more affordable. Our platform equips real estate professionals with everything they need to:

Strengthen their brand identity
Reach the right buyers with ease
Stand out in competitive local markets
Achieve consistent business growth

No matter the size or location, we enable every business to increase sales while building a strong, recognizable presence in the market.

 Brantford India – Simplifying Real Estate Marketing, Powering Growth.

Name: Rich Commercial Realty
Description: The entire team at RCR is passionate about what we do. Our focus on detail, responsiveness, and quality has allowed RCR to thrive for 35 years, and advise clients locally in Raleigh-Durham, across 26 states, and internationally. We specialize in advising clients in office, industrial, and healthcare sectors.  Whether you are a fortune 500 company, national or regional firm, or a growing local business, we have the experience and expertise to assist you in your space needs and add value to your company and its real estate strategy.

Name: Exospace
Description:
Exospace offers the best coworking space in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with locations at Nexus Esplanade, Rasulgarh, and DLF Cyber City, Patia. Spanning 40,000+ sqft and trusted by 50+ happy customers, We offer fully furnished office spaces for rent in Bhubaneswar, including private cabins, dedicated spaces, meeting rooms, day pass for freelancers, shared office spaces, and plug-and-play office spaces in Bhubaneswar. 

We aim to design inspiring workspaces that boost productivity and make work enjoyable, recognising the importance of well-designed offices in professional life. We also have co-working spaces in Kolkata, Noida, and Bangalore.

For more details visit our website

Name: Arkfield Capital
Description:
Arkfield Capital is a private equity real estate firm with a focus on development and value-add investments in Canada.

Committed to our investors, we work with an expansive network of developers to source, evaluate, underwrite, and execute on investment opportunities that optimize investor ROI.

Name: Ruakura Superhub
Description: Ruakura Superhub will become New Zealand’s largest integrated commercial and lifestyle development with a prominent inland hub and logistics facilities. Every aspect of the Ruakura inland hub and logistics zone have been engineered to improve the freight economics of New Zealand’s upper North Island and deliver the best overall value and efficiency.

Name: Real Estate Executive Council (REEC)
Description: REEC is the premier trade association for minorities at executive levels in commercial real estate. Through programs, conferences, networking events and alliances with strategic partners, REEC members receive access to resources in various forms that will support the advancement of their careers and professional goals. Beyond its membership, REEC is creating a community of support amongst minorities in the CRE industry.

Name: Byggeselskab Mogens de Linde A/S
Description:
We offer business leases to any company, whether it is small businesses looking for office space or larger businesses that require more space. Byggeselskab Mogens de Linde A / S undertakes rental of own commercial properties for offices, shops and showrooms.

Byggeselskab Mogens de Linde A / S is an Aarhusian commercial property company that has been hosting many exciting and attractive properties for over 40 years, ranging from Aarhus to Copenhagen. Among other things are Central Værkstedet and Pakhuset in the Aarhus area, as well as Kuglegården, Quintus Bastionen and Bryggergården in Copenhagen. In addition, we also sell holiday homes in the beautiful area of Øer Maritime Ferieby in Ebeltoft, located in the middle region of Jutland, Denmark.

We are a company that likes to explore the potential of the buildings, while focusing on their historical and unique character in the restoration process. In this way, we create office spaces beyond the usual. This emphasizes our great interest in the distinctive and unique properties that characterize our portfolio. We place emphasis on quality and credibility as well as the ability to provide a high level of service to our tenants.

Call us or send us an email if you are missing a business lease:

- Headquarters: Jens Baggesensvej 88F, 2. 8200 Aarhus N

- Tel: +45 86 16 57 00 (Mon-Thurs: 08.00-16.30, Fri: 08.00-13.30)

- Mail: info@delinde.dk

Name: CREW Dallas
Description:
CREW Dallas is a non-profit organization of commercial real estate professionals affiliated nationally through membership in CREW Network, providing opportunities for networking, education, leadership development and civic/philanthropic involvement.

From a small group of 12 "real estate girls" in 1980 to more than 350 influential commercial real estate professionals today, members of CREW Dallas are serious about the real estate business. Respected by industry leaders around the country, this powerful networking force works together to exchange information, expand knowledge, develop business contacts and help each other succeed personally and professionally.

CREW is focused on advancing the success of women in commercial real estate and does so by looking outward to bring more women into the industry, showcasing member expertise and successes and serving as a resource to its members and the industry. The multi-disciplinary membership assists in all phases of commercial real estate transactions.

Name: LEPORE Propiedades
Description: Nuestra empresa está dedicada a la venta de inmuebles. Teniendo un fuerte compromiso con el cliente logrando generar con el mismo un trato personalizado que en el transcurso del tiempo nos ha dado un sin fin de clientes que confían en nosotros y nuestro grupo de profesionales su bien más preciado que es su vivienda.

Name: Indonesia Tourism Development Corporation
Description:
Indonesia Tourism Development Corporation, or ITDC, is an Indonesian state-owned company known for developing and operating the World Renowned Tourism Complex: the Nusa Dua.  Located in the southern part of Bali, ITDC under PT Pengembangan Pariwisata Indonesia (Persero), was established in 1973 after an exhaustive study by the Indonesian Government and the World Bank that sought to create an environmentally sustainable and integrated model for a tourism destination. 

With over 40 years of experience in creating world-class tourism destination, ITDC is now ready to spread its wings and assist the Government to carry out national tourism development programs by creating new tourism destinations in Mandalika Lombok and all over Indonesia.

Name: East Brown Cow
Description: East Brown Cow and its affiliates comprise a real estate investment, development, andmanagementcompany, established in the summer of 1989. Through meaningful connections to the surrounding urban fabric, high-qualitydesign, carefullycurated use, investment, andfirst-class property management services, East Brown Cowstrives to push the limits of excellence in the industry.

Name: Downtown Dayton Partnership
Description:
At the Downtown Dayton Partnership, we are dedicated to making downtown Dayton a better place to live, work and visit. Working with downtown property owners, businesses and residents, we provide strategic planning, business development and marketing services to grow and strengthen our downtown.

Our free and confidential Site Seeker program offers everyone -- from C-Suite execs to gritty startup entrepreneurs -- the opportunity to find the perfect work environment. 

BE where the top talent is.
BE steps away from the region's best attractions.
BE part of something bigger.
BE downtown.

Name: Goodstone Living
Description:
Specialist real estate investment manager creating a better way to rent.
 
The full-service platform acquires, develops and operates high quality rental housing in London and key regional cities. The business’ senior management team has over 25 years average experience in the residential sector and extensive residential development and operational expertise.
 
The business is focused on delivering and operating the next generation of rental housing that integrates innovation, sustainability, wellbeing, and customer experience. Goodstone Living’s ambition is to become the UK’s leading specialist manager of build-to-rent residential communities and is seeking to assemble a best-in-class portfolio by acquiring stabilised assets, developing sites, forward fundings and corporate M&A opportunities.

Name: Reserve Capital Partners
Description: Reserve Capital Partners (RCP) is a vertically integrated real estate private equity firm offering comprehensive investment solutions in commercial real estate. With a focus on industrial, IOS, land, and select distressed office product types, RCP leverages its in-house expertise to manage the entire lifecycle of a real estate project. Operating primarily in North Texas and other select markets, we employ fund structures and alternative investment strategies to ensure superior risk-adjusted returns. RCP’s strategic approach encompasses data-driven acquisitions and developments, and meticulous financial management, all aimed at maximizing value for our investors.

Name: Greenberg Gibbons Properties
Description: Greenberg Gibbons Properties is a purpose-built firm focused on Class AA multi tenant light industrial development. Strong vision, innovative design, institutional functionalities, and being the best landlord in the shallow bay ecosystem are hallmarks of how we create engaging workplaces for your company and partnerships from a landlord/tenant vantage point. Simply put, people love to work at our properties, and we want to grow WITH you. Help us develop a blue-chip 25M SF portfolio.

Name: Silver Star Properties REIT, Inc.
Description:
Silver Star Properties REIT, Inc., is a premier property management company in the Houston, Dallas, and San Antonio markets. Silver Star Properties has owned and operated commercial office, retail, flex, and industrial properties since 1983, offering premium space at attractive rates. With more than 39 years of commercial leasing expertise in Houston, San Antonio, and Dallas, we understand exactly what our tenants require. 

For more information, visit www.silverstarreit.com

Name: Defease With Ease | Thirty Capital
Description:
Defease With Ease | Thirty Capital is the premier partner for mid-market commercial real estate owners, serving as trusted advisors for debt management. By aligning 25 years of expertise with cutting-edge technologies, we help our clients proactively navigate changing markets, manage interest rate risk, and achieve superior results. 

We act as your debt management advisor, leveraging our extensive market knowledge in structured finance and interest rates to optimize your debt and enhance portfolio performance.

Name: Nukleus Co-Working & Managed Offices
Description:
Nukleus provide all inclusive office space solution under one roof, whether it is a permanent corporate office space or a trendy plug & play station, virtual office or coworking office space in multiple locations of NCR Region, we have it all.

Nukleus is one of the top coworking spaces and offers professional coworking space with startup zones, flexible & dedicated desks, private cabins, meeting rooms, innovative spaces and much more. We also offer fully serviced & managed workspace solution for enterprises ranging from 50-500 seats or more depending upon your requirements.

Each Space is Created and Managed By Team of Professionals including Real Estate Architects, Designers, And Management Experts. We handcraft every aspect the office space (coworking, serviced and managed) to ensure you a place that’s fully-equipped and designed for your focused productivity.

Explore the diversity which comes as a gift with our wide range of state of the art coworking office spaces. Get motivated by the work culture around you and be a part of community building programs specially crafted at Nukleus.

Nukleus offers Co-working & Managed Offices in Delhi/Noida/Gurgaon at prime locations that includes Connaught Place, Saket, Pusa Road, Noida Sec-142 & Sec-62 and Gurgaon Sec-53 (Golf link road). 

Coworking spaces includes:
 private cabins
 flexible & dedicated desks 
 meeting/conference rooms
 day passes
 virtual offices
 cafeteria
 innovative spaces for video shoots
 and much more...

Nukleus offers fully serviced and/or managed office space solutions for enterprises too. Your options are:
 managed/serviced 
 furnished 
 warm shell 
 bare shell 

At Nukleus, you can reach us through phone, email or by visiting our website for more information.
 +91 85870 13119
 Info@nukleus.work
www.nukleus.work

Name: Honeywell Building Solutions
Description:
Buildings affect people every moment of every day. And at Honeywell Building Technologies (HBT), we’re transforming the way every building operates, because better buildings make our lives better. Over 23,000 HBT global employees support buildings of every type, from commercial offices, stores and schools to hospitals, airports and arenas.
Our diverse technologies and brands enable us to create holistic solutions, improving virtually every aspect of your building’s environment and experience. We believe buildings should be efficient and sustainable — and that building data can guide business decisions.

Name: HFD
Description:
HFD is a diverse and dynamic property, technology, and energy specialist, standing at the intersection of innovation and sustainability. We have built our reputation over the last 30 years with our divisions pioneering new standards to create lasting value.

We have delivered over £1 billion in gross development value, with more than 2.8 million sq ft of property completed and have the first Tier III certified data centre in Scotland. We invest in, develop, and manage a range of prestigious developments, including Strathclyde Business Park, 177 Bothwell Street and G1 in George Square, Glasgow.

Name: Tour La Marseillaise
Description:
Tour La Marseillaise
L’HYMNE D’UN TERRITOIRE

Ensemble, dessinons le nouveau visage de Marseille

135 mètres de haut
38 000 m2 de bureaux et services
Excellence environnementale
Vue sur mer

Imaginée par Jean Nouvel, la Tour La Marseillaise est un projet visionnaire qui redessine la skyline de Marseille.

Au cœur d’Euroméditerranée, Constructa et ses partenaires s’engagent pour le dynamisme d’une ville, en créant une tour innovante au service de l'attractivité du territoire marseillais.

Name: Saglo Companies
Description:
We are Owners, Operators and Experts. Our current portfolio spans 2.4 million square feet across Florida, Georgia, and Maryland. 

For nearly five decades, Saglo has built a trusted reputation by acquiring and managing shopping centers with care and purpose. We focus on long-term growth through thoughtful investments, active asset management, and disciplined financial oversight. 

Our mission is simple: deliver vibrant, welcoming retail spaces where communities shop and businesses thrive.

Name: She Has a Deal.
Description:
Creating new pathways to CRE ownership + development by inspiring, connecting, educating, and investing in women.  First on the agenda: the She Has A Deal Hotel Investment Pitch Competition.  

This competition is specifically designed for women in hospitality, real estate, and related fields to:
 Expose them to hotel ownership and development.

 Educate them on how to analyze and structure a deal.

 Create a forum for cultivating professional relationships that lead to mentorship and future collaborations.

Donate to our mission: 
https://gofund.me/a259c13c

Name: Asset Management Group Limited
Description:
Asset Management Group is a leading consultancy firm that provides financial and business advisory services and leaders in the area of real estate conceptualization from inception to finish. AMG Ltd was incorporated to acquire and develop real estate assets in major cities in Nigeria. The firm has earned a reputation for conceptualizing and concept development of projects including engineering, developing, and adapting very novel ideas into the local environment.

The business activities of AMG focus on the entire real estate development chain, ranging from land acquisition to concept development to property management services.

AMG innovates by adapting international concepts and current international trends into the local environment to create novel projects. This it achieves by the assembly of world-class international and indigenous project teams and consultants for each development.

AMG’s focus is client-driven and we tailor our services to suit each client's specific needs, value requirements, efficiency, and cost consideration.

Name: Tree of Knowledge (TOK) Brisbane
Description:
What is the Tree of Knowledge?

The Tree of Knowledge (TOK) is a free informal quarterly networking event for people who operate in the property, construction and affiliated industries. TOK events are held in Brisbane, Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Canberra & Newcastle. 

Events are generally held on a Wednesday between 5.30 – 8.30 pm in a public bar, hotel, pub or similar where attendees have been able to purchase food and beverage at their leisure and own expense.

Name: Catalyst Healthcare Real Estate
Description:
Catalyst was founded in 2011 with the vision of understanding the unprecedented changes in the healthcare industry and the commitment to offer innovative solutions that drive operating efficiencies and results. Our team of experts has successfully developed an assortment of diverse projects, allowing us to provide a comprehensive real estate services platform on an in-house basis.
Catalyst seeks to achieve healthcare provider goals by working in partnership with its clients to design a comprehensive real estate solution that best supports their mission, vision, and values.
Our platform of integrated real estate deliverables is specifically designed for the ever-evolving landscape of healthcare. Our team seeks to positively impact healthcare with strategic investment in development, acquisition, and strategy services. For more information, please visit catalysthre.com.

Name: NAI Brannen Goddard
Description: NAI Brannen Goddard is a privately-held commercial real estate firm headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia with a global network of more than 5,000 professionals. Our firm serves tenants, landlords, and investors in virtually every industry, and our brokers are top producers with 60 million square feet of listings in the metro Atlanta area. We are committed to being a leading provider of commercial real estate services in Atlanta and beyond.

Name: Koppal Toy Cluster
Description: Spread over 400 acres, Koppal Toy Cluster has been planned to house an entire Toy manufacturing ecology, designed to support more than 100 Industrial units, support businesses and living amenities for 25,000 people. Its proximity to and connectivity with Hubbali as well as Bengaluru makes it an ideal business hub. From the ease of setting up a manufacturing unit to becoming an integral part of a value chain within the Toy Manufacturing Ecosystem, Koppal Toy Cluster offers it all.

Name: CBRE Canada (FR)
Description:
CBRE fournit des solutions complètes et évolutives aux propriétaires, locataires et investisseurs à l’échelle locale et mondiale.

Le groupe CBRE, inc. (NYSE: coté comme entreprise Fortune 500 et S & P 500, dont le siège social se situe à Los Angeles, est la plus importante firme de services immobiliers commerciaux et d’investissement au monde (selon les revenus de 2015). L’entreprise compte plus de 70 000 employés (excluant les affiliés) et dessert les investisseurs et les occupants d’actifs immobiliers à partir de plus de 400 bureaux à travers le monde (excluant les bureaux affiliés). CBRE offre une vaste gamme de services intégrés, comprenant la gestion des installations, des transactions et des projets, la gestion des propriétés, la gestion des investissements, l’évaluation et les services-conseils, la location de propriétés, le conseil stratégique, la vente de propriétés, les services hypothécaires et les services d’aménagement. Visitez notre site Web au www.cbre.com  

Au Canada, les 20 bureaux de CBRE Limitée comptent environ 1 885 employés répartis d’un océan à l’autre. Visitez notre site Web au www.cbre.ca.

Name: CREW UK
Description:
CREW UK is Chapter of CREW Network, a global member organisation dedicated to the mission of transforming the commercial real estate industry by advancing women. 

We believe that to champion diversity you must create an inclusive environment, so we are open to all, regardless of gender. Our network is formed of experts from across all fields of real estate, and we come together to share knowledge, skills and opportunities. 

We are ran by members for members, supported by the team at CREW Network. Our Chapter is overseen by a board of directors and our committees organise our activities and connect our members.

Name: Berkeley Capital Advisors
Description:
Berkeley Capital Advisors is a retail investment brokerage firm that deals exclusively in the representation of income-producing real estate in the Carolinas and throughout the Southeast. The nine partners have 109+ years of combined investment sales experience, and since 1997, Berkeley Capital Advisors has closed 2,637 separate transactions with $17.6BN in total sales volume. We consistently rank in the top 10 nationally for retail brokers. 

Berkeley Capital does not lease, manage, develop or purchase real estate—we specialize in the brokerage of investment properties, allowing us to focus on our fiduciary responsibilities to our seller and investor clients. Our principals have represented a variety of sellers and purchasers, including life insurance companies, pension fund advisors, real estate investment trusts, lenders, bank trust real estate departments, and government agencies, plus numerous private real estate investors and partnerships.

Although Berkeley Capital arranges investment sales throughout the Southeast, the majority of our activity is concentrated in the Carolinas. No other brokerage group, including national firms, has sold more shopping centers or single-tenant properties in the Carolinas. We are proud of our national reputation as a reliable and consistent source of investment properties.

Name: Founders Spaces
Description:
Founders Spaces is a workplace platform that is redefining the office experience. 

Our first location being a 1000m2 stand-alone villa in in the heart of Cairo’s Tahrir.

FS provides private offices and suites with flexible terms within a thoughtfully designed, full-service workplace — powered by a community of leading entrepreneurs and technology companies

Name: Toro Development Company
Description: At Toro Development Company, we believe past results are a powerful predictor of future success. Veteran real estate developer Mark Toro has a track record of delivering outsized returns to investors. His differentiated model combines data analysis with creative thinking and a commitment to community. With multidisciplinary experience, the team at Toro Development Company is uniquely positioned to deploy the best use, or mix of uses, for each development opportunity. They know how to build community in a way that creates quantifiable value, something they have proven again and again, a competency that is now more relevant than ever.

Name: Kramer Consulting
Description:
The Power of an Advocate by Your Side

At Kramer, we believe every successful project starts with trust, clarity, and the right partner. As one of D.C.’s leading independent project management firms, we provide owner’s representation and strategic guidance across all phases of construction and renovation—delivering value, transparency, and measurable results.

For over 30 years, we’ve stood beside our clients as true advocates—protecting their interests, aligning project goals, and helping navigate complexity with confidence. That’s the power of an advocate by your side.
Our strength lies not just in what we do, but how we do it. We tailor each team to the client and project, applying proven processes and people-first leadership that consistently drive success across sectors.

Kramer is proudly certified as a CBE in Washington, D.C., serving clients locally and nationwide with the same commitment: to be a steady, knowledgeable partner you can count on from start to finish.

Name: Dubai Real Estate Centre
Description:
We want to contribute to the structured and healthy development of Dubai. One that exists by its people and for its people.

We want to continue the pursuit of our founder who has been an active local developer for decades, working towards making Dubai a more balanced and livable city. We are proud of how far we have come and we are determined to continue adding value far into the future.

Name: Trudel
Description: Trudel gère un important actif immobilier au Québec. L’entreprise assure la gestion ainsi que les opérations des espaces locatifs, des immeubles ainsi que le développement des projets de Trudel. L’approche personnalisée de Trudel repose sur une communication efficace et sans intermédiaire afin d’établir un lien de confiance avec ses locataires.

Name: Woliba
Description: Woliba è il Business Park di Roma in zona EUR di proprietà di Fondo Laurus gestito da Dea Capital Real Estate SGR. Qui troverai oltre 40.000 mq di uffici immersi in una grande area verde, ricca di facilities a pochi passi da negozi di quartiere e servizi. Una proposta unica nel suo genere nella città di Roma, pensata per offrire alle aziende un workplace in linea con gli standard internazionali, dove lavoro e benessere possano convivere in perfetto equilibrio.

Name: Houxury
Description:
Houxury encapsulates a refined vision of flex-living, where every space is carefully curated to embody comfort, style, and connection.

Houxury offers exceptional living experiences in Spain. Our residences, located in prime locations, offer more than just a place to live; they represent a lifestyle that speaks to a discerning audience of young professionals, entrepreneurs, master students, and digital nomads seeking a vibrant community and a high-quality living experience.

We design spaces where every detail contributes to an experience that feels both exclusive and welcoming. As we prepare for the next phase of growth, we invite forward-thinking investors to explore opportunities to be part of this transformative journey with us.

Mail: marketing@houxury.es
For more information and reservations, visit our website:

Name: Flowork
Description:
A Flowork trouxe ao Brasil a tendência mundial de ambientes coorporativos compartilhados. São salas totalmente mobiliadas e equipadas, espaços exclusivos com excelente projeto arquitetônico, cobertura acústica e completa infraestrutura voltada para produtividade e alta performance. 

Com um funcionamento 24h, a Flowork oferece serviços de domicílio fiscal, atendimento telefônico, gerenciamento de correspondência, cabines telefônicas e privativas, impressoras empresariais,  além de se comprometer com a sustentabilidade, disponibilizando bicicletas compartilhadas.

Localizado no coração de Moinhos de Vento em Porto Alegre, o Green Office é um empreendimento inteligente de alto padrão, que respeita os princípios da sustentabilidade.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Aegis Property Group
Description:
At Aegis, our purpose is to anticipate needs – both tenant’s and landlord’s - and overdeliver on expectations. We are infinitely resourceful and strategic in our approach to finding the best tenants for properties and the best properties for tenants. 
 
We don’t rest until we have the result. Our goal is to consistently outperform and overdeliver on expectations – leasing more commercial property more effectively for owners, and conversely, matching tenants with their very best business premises and negotiating successfully on their behalf.

Name: Kirkby Diamond (Part of Eddisons)
Description:
Proudly part of Eddisons. Property consultants and chartered surveyors, offering a total solution for all surveying and commercial agency needs. 

Our team has many years' experience of working with commercial, industrial, rural, public and private clients; from homeowners and landlords to large scale developers and commercial businesses.

With offices in Milton Keynes, Luton, Bedford, St Albans and Enfield, our Chartered Surveyors and Property Consultants provide expert advice to local and national clients, throughout Buckinghamshire, Bedfordshire, Hertfordshire and parts of Northamptonshire, Cambridgeshire, Oxfordshire & North London.
                  
All partners and senior consultants are Fellows or Members of the Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors or Members of the Royal Town Planning Institute.

Name: Aries Capital
Description:
Aries Capital is a diversified, commercial real estate banking and investment firm headquartered in Chicago with offices in Miami and Los Angeles. 

Since its founding in 1991 by Neil Freeman, Aries Capital has arranged and/or directly funded over $8 billion for industrial, self-storage, retail, office, multifamily, hotel and other commercial assets across the United States and Caribbean.  View transactions.

Our banking team specializes in arranging debt and equity capital for clients nationwide through deep-rooted relationships with Wall Street CMBS Lenders, Banks/Credit Unions, Debt Funds, Family Offices, Insurance Companies, and other Institutional Equity Investors.

Our investment team – operating as Aries Capital Private Equity – is focused on the acquisition and operation of industrial and logistics assets throughout the United States, with a particular emphasis on net lease assets and sale-leaseback opportunities and concentration in Florida.

Aries and affiliates hold additional diversified principal investments with equity interests currently valued at over $250 million. Notable assets include The Roosevelt New Orleans, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel, The 1,000-acre Three Oaks Master Development in Fort Myers, Florida, and newly constructed Tranquility Beach Resort on Meads Bay Beach in British Caribbean Anguilla.

Through our affiliate Urban Development Fund (UDF), we are also one of the most successful providers of New Market Tax Credits (NMTCs) in the United States. UDF has been awarded over $800 million in NMTCs and other tax credits, which translates into over $2 billion in transactions benefiting our country’s most distressed neighborhoods.

Name: Treveth
Description:
Treveth delivers new homes and commercial development for the benefit of people who live and work in Cornwall.

We're a B Corp certified Cornish company that puts Cornwall and its people first. Any profit we make is returned to our partner, Cornwall Council.

Our mission is to deliver Profit with Purpose, where social and environmental benefit is just as important as commercial return.

Name: NAIOP New Jersey
Description: NAIOP New Jersey, the Commercial Real Estate Development Association, promotes and protects the interests of the industry, including commercial, industrial, warehouse distribution and mixed-use development.

Name: Ultrapark Development Group
Description:
At Ultrapark Development Group, our mission is to create optimal workspaces to satisfy the highest demands of national and international companies that want to settle in Costa Rica.

Companies want to focus on their “Core Business”. ULTRAPARK as a SINGLE POINT OF CONTACT and long-term business ally, goes hand in hand with its clients at all stages; supporting, simplifying and contributing to the success and permanence of companies in the Free Zone in Costa Rica.

Based on our pillar of being a long-term business partner, ULTRAPARK provides Real Estate solutions for all needs; from the design, construction and remodeling of offices, to operation and ongoing maintenance.


ULTRAPARK allows customers to realize the following advantages: Time Savings: By receiving from ULTRAPARK through a single point of contact, customers benefit from the simplification of their processes. They don't have to negotiate or manage multiple vendors, contractors and managers.

+34 years of experience: we understand your needs, we are the first service business park in Costa Rica, we are pioneers in Free Trade Zones.

Made at Home: with Ultrapark's team we construct our buildings, fit out their premises and take care of our facilities and equipment.

Costa Rica’s business environment has matured thanks to complex operational processes and has been able to stand out as the number one exporter of value-added services. To this we can add the increasing demand in English as a language studies. The country currently has one of the highest literacy rates in the continent, with about 94% of the population. Costa Rican and foreign investments have allowed this development.

Since 1989, ULTRAPARK DEVELOPMENT GROUP has innovated the market with the creation of free trade zone business parks, corporations of great prestige and global reach have boosted their growth, taking advantage of the skills of Costa Ricans in more strategically, intellectually and technologically challenging activities.

Name: NAI Ohio Equities
Description:
NAI Ohio Equities is one of the largest, long-standing, independently-owned commercial real estate and property management firms in Central Ohio. As an affiliate of NAI Global, Ohio Equities leverages a powerful, global network of independent, owner-operated commercial real estate brokerage firms, spanning more than 375 offices and 6,000 local market experts. 

Founded in 1971 by George (Sandy) Simpson, Ohio Equities has grown its services over 50 years to include commercial real estate and property management. With more than 150 employees, including more than 40 brokers and property managers, we leverage the diverse experience of our team to provide organizations with a portfolio of real estate management options. 

We care about Columbus because we ARE Columbus.

Name: RCM
Description: Founded in 1999, Real Capital Markets (RCM) is the global marketplace for buying and selling commercial real estate (CRE). RCM increases the speed, exposure, and security of CRE sales through its streamlined online platform. Solutions include integrated property marketing, transaction management, and business intelligence solutions that unify broker-level and firm-level data and work flows. To date, the Company has executed over 72,000 assignments with total consideration in excess of $2.4 trillion.

Name: SpaceN Workspaces
Description:
SpaceN is an online aggregator for office spaces that provides coworking spaces, shared office, virtual office, commercial offices, private cabins, meeting rooms that you can book on the hour/day/week/months or long term lease basis.

SpaceN solves two problems. First, we help property owners optimize their use of space to generate additional revenue and second provide co-working space users, an office space that suits their needs in the area of preference and budgets.

SpaceN is a perfect platform for SMEs, entrepreneurs, freelancers, remote workers, startups and SpaceN spaces providers, independent offices, and working cafes.

Name: WindMass Capital
Description:
WindMass Capital is a private equity investment company focused on direct investment into commercial real estate.  Our core investment strategy is to acquire, develop, own and manage a diversified portfolio of both value-add and urban infill developed multifamily properties generating optimal risk adjusted returns for our investors.

We will have over 13,539 units owned as of April 2023 and a total transaction volume of over $1.2 billion.

Name: Adler Group, Inc.
Description:
Adler Group, Inc., formed in 1978 and headquartered in Miami, is an aggressive, multi-profile real estate firm. Adler Group, its employees and its affiliates offer a seamless network of services designed to maximize the value and strength of the organization’s real estate assets. 

Throughout its history, Adler Group has developed and acquired in excess of 18 million square feet of industrial, office, retail and residential real estate. Today, by means of relationships with a prestigious list of institutional and private investors and nationally recognized financial lenders, the company owns and manages an extensive real estate portfolio comprised primarily of multi-tenant industrial and office properties located in strategic markets throughout the Southeast,  Mid-Atlantic and Southwest United States, including Miami, Tampa, Naples, Richmond, Nashville, Houston and the D.C. metro area. 

For more information, please visit our website: www.adlergroup.com

Connect with us and find out what opportunities exist in your area.

Name: AW Property Co
Description:
AW Property Co. is a fully integrated real estate investment company that specializes in acquiring and enhancing medical and professional office properties in major markets throughout the Southeast.  We have a highly dedicated, customer-focused team of professionals with expertise in all facets of real estate acquisitions, redevelopment, finance, operations and asset management. Our headquarters are located in North Palm Beach, Florida with regional offices in Fort Lauderdale, Sarasota and Tampa.

Our strategy is to target high quality real estate with solid fundamentals, competitive income returns and strong potential for price appreciation.  We seek situations where assets can be acquired at below market prices and where we can enhance value through operational improvement and strategic repositioning. We are able to source significant deal flow through our active property services division and proprietary network of operating partners and professionals.  Since inception, we have sponsored numerous private investment partnerships, institutional investment joint ventures and a series of closed-end real estate private equity funds.

Name: ACM Advisors
Description:
ACM Advisors is a Canadian Alternative Asset Manager that specializes in the creation, structuring and management of pooled Canadian commercial mortgage funds. 

Our conservative investment approach and our proven ability to assess, mitigate and price risk has resulted in a 30+ year track record of successful performance. ACM Advisors is a majority owned subsidiary of EQB Inc. (TSX: EQB).

Name: Kramer Consulting
Description:
Project Management for New Construction and Renovation Projects. 

Kramer Consulting Services, PC (KRAMER) is a multi-faceted organization providing owner’s representation & project management services for all phases of new construction and renovation projects.  Established in 1994, KRAMER provides unbiased advice resulting in added value to our clients who range from public and private institutions to business enterprises; encompassing the full spectrum of the owner and end-user markets.

KRAMER is a Certified Business Entity (CBE) in the District of Columbia and offers services nationwide.

OUR MISSION
To provide our clients with a single resource to manage all aspects of their project and obtain maximum value for every dollar spent.

CORE VALUES
Create Effective Partnerships
Provide Measurable Value
Promote Ethical and Respectful Relationships
Engage in Sustainable Practices
Deliver Dependable Results
Community Outreach
 
PHILOSOPHY
We believe that the power of our company lies within the collective whole of our talents and commitment. We strive to provide our clients with the best and brightest professionals for their projects. The goal of the active founding principal remains to provide a working environment that fosters personal growth, quality of life, and professional achievement.

Name: CitySpace
Description:
CitySpace is an operator of flexible office space boasting an area of over 18,000 sq m, enabling more comfortable work in a friendlier and more modern environment. CitySpace has one of the country’s largest networks of tailor-made products. It manages serviced, hybrid, as well as virtual offices and meeting rooms. 

CitySpace belongs to the Echo Investment capital group, so when developing its services, it can choose office buildings that meet the highest technical standards. It creates ergonomic and smart workspaces in exceptional locations, close to everything that’s important to city life – restaurants, cafés, shopping centres, shops, and cultural institutions.

Name: E-business Park
Description: Com 160 mil m² de área em condomínio fechado, bosque e área verde com mais de 2.000 árvores, espaço de eventos e convenções, praça de alimentação com mais de 10 opções de restaurantes, praça de serviços com bancos, farmácia, revistaria, lotérica e lojas diversas, portaria 24h, dentre outras facilidades, o complexo prima por respeito, segurança e tecnologia.

Name: Century | Urban
Description:
Century | Urban is a vertically integrated real estate advisory, investment and asset management firm. Known for our solutions-based approach to complex real estate matters, we seamlessly operate as a trusted advisor and investment manager. Clients rely upon the firm as an indispensable partner in their real estate ventures.

A strong foundation anchored in hands-on development and investment management experience yields astute insight based upon real-world experience. This multidisciplinary expertise is integral to our firm’s and our clients’ successes. By leveraging seasoned local relationships, we not only streamline processes but also uncover valuable opportunities.

Avison Young creates real economic, social and environmental value as a global real estate advisor, powered by people.

Twitter: @avisonyoung and for listings, check out @AYListingsDeals
Blog: http://blog.avisonyoung.com

Name: NAIOP Oregon
Description:
NAIOP, the Commercial Real Estate Development Association,is the leading organization for developers, investors, owners & operators, brokers, and related professionals in office, industrial and mixed-use real estate. We are a nonprofit trade organization based in Washington, D.C., with over 50 chapters throughout the country. 

Our focus is to ensure a vibrant and sustainable commercial real estate industry.  We provide strong government advocacy and serve as a platform for commercial real estate professionals to connect and learn from one another. 

NAIOP benefits its members by creating a sense of community with a dedicated Board of Directors, active committees, and engaged members who work to track and support legislative issues, provide quality educational programs, and organize networking opportunities.

Name: BZH Groupe Immobilier
Description: Agence dédiée aux transactions professionnelles et particulières, vous souhaitez vendre, louer ou acheter un bien, nous déployons pour vous une équipe de professionnels formés pour chaque métier : - Fonds de commerce (Restaurant - Bar - Tabac - Presse)- Emplacements commerciaux- Immobilier d'entreprise- Hôtels / Campings- Cession d'entreprise - Département Investissement - Gestion locative - Habitation. Name: T3 Advisors, A Savills Company
Description:
T3 Advisors joined Savills in 2021 as T3 Advisors, A Savills Company, and is now fully integrated with Savills and brand beginning December 1, 2022, and will officially be known as Savills. As a single, unified business, we improve our brand positioning, better leverage internal resources, and strengthen our client strategies and solutions.

T3 Advisors, A Savills Company, knows that space is the lifeblood of a business and a major platform for growth. Working as an extension of the team, T3 Advisors, A Savills Company, developed and implements a wide variety of corporate real estate solutions for organizations ranging from startups to multinational corporations. By only representing tenants—not landlords—T3 Advisors, A Savills Company also offered a transparent, conflict-free look into real estate strategy.

The company’s real estate services included tailored brokerage, location advisory, portfolio planning, consultative insights, project management, and ongoing workplace support. Placed at the center of innovation ecosystems with a presence in San Diego, Raleigh-Durham, San Francisco, Palo Alto, NYC, and Boston, T3 Advisors, A Savills Company has advised thousands of companies globally, including LinkedIn, HubSpot, ASICS, AutoDesk, WorkDay, and Battery Ventures.

Agence Abault 31
Adresse : 3 rue d’Alsace Lorraine, Toulouse
Zone de couverture : Toulouse et Haute-Garonne

Agence Abault 33
Adresse : 102 Cours Alsace Lorraine, Bordeaux 
Zone de couverture : Bordeaux et Gironde

Agence Abault 34

Adresse : 28 avenue de Maurin, Montpellier

Nos consultants immobiliers spécialisés offrent une expertise approfondie pour accompagner les clients professionnels dans toutes les étapes de leurs projets immobiliers, notamment :

-	La location et la cession de locaux commerciaux (droit au bail, murs)

-	La vente et la location de bureaux
-	La location et la vente de locaux d’activité/entrepôts

Grâce à une connaissance approfondie du marché et une approche centrée sur l’excellence, Abault Immobilier d’entreprise s’engage à offrir des solutions immobilières personnalisées et des services de haute qualité. Que ce soit pour la recherche de locaux commerciaux, bureaux, entrepôts ou des opportunités d’investissement, nous assurons avec passion et implication.

Name: Central Park Perth
Description:
Since its completion in 1992, Central Park has been an icon of Perth’s skyline. To this day, it remains Perth’s tallest building and most distinguished business address.
 
Situated at 152-158 St Georges Terrace, Central Park offers the balance of the CBD’s only green space, the city’s most central location, panoramic views and world-class facilities.
 
Home to 14 major tenants, Central Park provides 51 floors of premium and flexible office and retail space to over 3,500 workers. With frontages on Hay Street and St Georges Terrace, Central Park is located within short walking distance of buses and two central train stations, shopping malls, eateries as well as other commercial addresses.
 
A premium-grade tower, Central Park offers a work-and-life centred experience. The precinct boasts 2,500sqm of landscaped parklands,
elite conference centre, end-of-trip facilities, an exclusive tenant-only fitness centre and a full-service concierge.
 
Central Park is jointly owned by Perron Group and Frasers Property.

Description:
Established in 1990, Owens Realty Services is a full-service commercial brokerage, investment, management, maintenance, housekeeping and environmental services company. RE/MAX Corporate si pone come un unico referente che coordina le attività di commercializzazione degli immobili di agenzie e consulenti RE/MAX specializzati in ognuno dei segmenti di mercato.

Evergreen works with clients ranging from mid-size to large in capital intense industries to leverage their job creation and capital spend to maximize the incentive packages driven by federal, state and local governments and utilities.

Evergreen will negotiate on behalf of our clients using our skills in the space to aggressively drive more incentive dollars to the clients’ bottom line while enhancing the ROI of the project for our clients. With a high level of advisory and service minded delivery, Evergreen will push to assure that both the local community and our client locating in the community are treated fairly to create a “win-win” scenario for all parties. In using Evergreen’s services, we will assure to our clients that we will secure 50% higher incentive packages than they would on their own.

Evergreen was founded by two partners that in working with clients and Economic Development in the US and Globally saw a better and more client-centric approach to managing and maximizing the incentive process. At Evergreen, we work with clients in an advisory capacity so they can focus on their core business and at the same time be assured they left nothing on the table relative to incentives.

Evergreen is structured financially to only win when our clients win. Our success is tied to the amount of incentives we can secure for our clients and lends itself to total transparency in the process.

Name: Silkroute
Description:
At Silkroute, we are dedicated to providing a comprehensive range of technical services that empower our clients to make informed decisions, whether they are embarking on construction projects, property acquisitions, or renovation endeavors. With a commitment to excellence, a wealth of experience, and a team of experts, we are the go-to solution for technical due diligence reports, buyer's property inspection reports, quantity surveying services, CAD drawings services, and civil engineering consultations.

Our Services

1. Technical Due Diligence Reports

In a world where informed decisions are crucial, our technical due diligence reports serve as the bedrock for your investments and project planning. We meticulously assess properties, infrastructure, and assets to identify potential risks and opportunities. Our comprehensive reports are designed to provide you with a clear understanding of the technical aspects of your project or property, ensuring that you can make sound decisions.

2. Buyer's Property Inspection Reports

Buying a property is a significant investment. Our buyer's property inspection reports are designed to give you a complete picture of the condition of a property before you make your purchase. Our thorough inspections cover all critical aspects, from structural integrity to safety compliance, empowering you to negotiate effectively and make informed decisions.

3. Quantity Surveying Services

Cost management is a critical aspect of any construction project. Our quantity surveying services provide accurate cost estimation and management, ensuring that your project stays within budget. We assist in budget preparation, cost analysis, and procurement strategy development, ultimately saving you time and money.

4. CAD Drawings Services

In the digital age, accurate and detailed CAD drawings are essential for effective planning and execution. Our CAD drawing services provide you with precise and comprehensive architectural and engineering drawings.

Name: Insight Consulting Services - Commercial Real Estate Management
Description:
Insight Consulting Services - Commercial Real Estate Management leverages over two decades of collective experience within the local market to deliver expert solutions in commercial real estate. Established in 2012, our consultancy specializes in a comprehensive range of services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients, with a strong focus on specialized Landlord Representation for Commercial Projects.

Landlord Representation Services Include:

CONCEPT PHASE: Collaborating with landlords from the initial concept stage to develop a strategic vision that aligns with market demands and maximizes potential returns. We provide insights on market trends, property positioning, and feasibility analysis to ensure a strong foundation for the project.

LEASING MANAGEMENT: Focusing on securing the right tenants through targeted leasing strategies. Our team handles all aspects of the leasing process, including marketing the property, conducting site tours, tenant acquisition, negotiating lease terms, and finalizing lease agreements. This ensures that properties attract and retain high-quality tenants, contributing to long-term stability and profitability.

POST-DEAL LEASING MANAGEMENT: Providing comprehensive support after the deal is closed, including ongoing tenant relations to ensure long-term success and value retention. We work closely with landlords to address any issues promptly and maintain high occupancy rates, ensuring the property continues to meet and exceed financial targets.

Our client base includes developers, corporate entities, and investors, each benefiting from our commitment to excellence and personalized service. At Insight Consulting Services, we are dedicated to fostering long-term partnerships by delivering measurable results and exceeding expectations.

Description:

APD was established in 2004 by Pep Rocca, who had previous experience in the accounting industry being one of the founding partners of RCR Partners, during this time Pep also focused on private property acquisitions and developments. APD is an exceptionally innovative and progressive company involved with all facets of the market, including industrial, commercial and retail developments, together with mixed use developments. The broad range and extent of projects undertaken has provided a benchmark of not only quality end products, but a level of cost efficiency that translates favourably to the tenant’s bottom line.
The provision of total fit-out packages is another component of services offered to clients to afford a seamless transition to new premises. APD maintain the capacity to accommodate the complete design and implementation of internal fit-out works incorporating the supply of partitioning, workstations, business furniture, joinery, communications systems etc, which contribute to the ease and simplicity of tenancy hand over and substantially reduces the complexities of relocation.
APD understands the industry and is continually looking for ways to remain innovative and progressive to continue to deliver a successful end result and maintain strong continuous client relationships.

Name: 氪空间（Kr Space）
Description:
氪空间于2014年成立于北京中关村创业大街，是最早一批中关村管委会认定的“创新型孵化器”，2016年初从36氪拆分独立运作，并确定了联合办公的发展方向，2019年5月，氪空间确立了打造“全周期企业办公服务商”的新战略，完成从“联合办公”到“综合办公服务+新型资产管理”的业务模式升级。

目前氪空间已经覆盖北京、上海、香港、广州、杭州、南京、武汉、天津、苏州、厦门、合肥等11个城市，运营40多个联合办公社区，服务企业数量超过3000家，会员数超过50000个，在行业中处于领先地位。创孵方面，氪空间已累计孵化260+项目，融资总额50亿+，项目总估值超过300亿元人民币。

氪空间诞生的初心是解决小微团队办公难的问题，使命是“让办公更美好”，从用户需求出发推出更多围绕办公生态的服务，实现“赋能一亿人的快乐办公生活”的愿景。未来，氪空间将依托成熟的空间产品规划能力、领先的智能办公系统与数据分析能力、精细化资产运营管理能力和独具优势的创投和增值服务能力，通过综合办公服务和新型资产管理方式，深度覆盖全生命周期企业办公及发展需求。

The vision of Kr Space is to build a global leading co-working space network and community. Its mission is to solve the difficulty of SMBs and SMTs to find proper working space, and to provide a much better working environment. The slogan of Kr Space is “Be With The Best”. With its closed-loop of co-working space, service and community network, Kr Space aims to build global leading elite communities.

Kr Space has built up high quality co-working spaces tailored for SMBs and SMTs. Its product offerings include individual office, mobile desk and open office area, catering for companies of different size. By the end of January 2018, Kr Space has 30 co-working spaces in 9 cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Hangzhou, Nanjing, Wuhan, Tianjin, Suzhou and Chengdu), and it will enter Hong Kong, Tokyo, Singapore and other markets soon. 

Kr Space has attracted leading investors for its fast development. In January 2016, Kr Spaces was separated from its parent company 36Kr, started to operate independently and finished A round fundraising. In the following November, Kr Space received over 200 million RMB A+ round funding from Prometheus Capital and IDG Capital. In July and September 2017, it received several hundreds of million RMB investment in another A+ round funding from CMIG and IDG. In November 2017, Kr Space finished its Pre-B round funding of 600 million RMB.

Description:
The Company is Acting as Turnkey Executors for and on behalf of the Societies which are intending to explore, "Self-Redevelopment" of their Registered Society, within the Region of Mumbai.

Once the Company is appointed Irrevocably as an Executor by the Society, shall plan the Suitable strategy for the Re-Development of the Project, prepare feasibility projections, appoint appropriate team including Architect, Structural Engineers, Liaison Agency, mobilize required means / funding for Re-Development of the Society, Obtain required clearances and permissions, source required TDR, avail Fungible FSI by paying Premium for and on behalf of the Society, Supervise Development of the Project Execution as per approved Plans, Handover Redeveloped Apartments to the existing / eligible members of the Society, plan marketing strategy, promotion and Sales of the Sale Component Area of the Redeveloped Society preferably as per Strategy or post OC, and provide Exit to the Society from the Borrowing and debt, (Subject to Feasibility).

Please share Proposal of the Societies Eligible for Re-Development, having Resolution, Consent of over 50% and more members for initiating Self-Redevelopment Process, having Conveyance of the Plot, without any Encroachment, and intending to appoint a Turn Key Executors.

Society / Land Lord may please share IM of the Society / Plot, sharing complete details of the total Occupants of the Society with Notified Carpet Area of respective Members of the Society, Area of Land Parcel, how old is the Present Structure ? Configuration for the Present Apartments ? Width of the Road, Any D P Remarks ? DP Plan, Conveyance Agreement, Society Registration Certificate, Liabilities if any, Share Copy of the Property Card, Floor Plans of the Present Building ? FSI Consumed by the Developers / Society ? Share Google Coordinates / PIN of the Location of the Property, please email complete details of the Society for evaluation.

Name: Wallace Development Company Limited
Description:
Wallace Development Company limited began in 1982 with the purchase and development of five small industrial units in Pacific Place in Wanganui.

From these humble beginnings our company has seen strong and steady growth and now, with offices in Havelock North, Palmerston North, Auckland and Tauranga, we have hundreds of successful commercial property development projects under our belt, side by side with a substantial commercial leasing portfolio, nation-wide.

We are known for our professionalism, integrity and specialist knowledge, backed by over three decades of experience and stability in the marketplace.

PROPERTY DEVELOPMENT

Wallace Development Company Limited offers a comprehensive turn-key service for the development of new commercial properties and the redevelopment of existing buildings.

Our strength lies in providing the right premises in the right location with the right design to accommodate our clients’ business profile and operational needs.

The process encompasses analysis of client requirements, site selection and procurement, the preparation of concept plans and design specifications followed by project management of the development from construction to handover.

We work closely with companies such as Omega Engineering and DesignCo to ensure a universally high level of expertise and experience is brought to every project.

COMMERCIAL LEASING AND PURCHASE

Our specialised leasing team excels in matching business premises and clients.

For new commercial property developments, we can procure purchasers or lessees for the premises and manage the leases on an ongoing basis.

We are skilled in the resolution of pre-existing leasing or ownership commitments and should a client have specific leasing requirements we can, with a tenancy agreement in place, either develop new premises for them from scratch or purchase and then upgrade, renovate, expand or adapt existing buildings to meet their needs.

Name: Triple O Campus Breda
Description:
De Triple O Campus is het centrum voor creativiteit en technologie in Breda en omstreken! Een groene en rustige oase in de stad. Bijna 100 bedrijven en uit verschillende disciplines werken hier samen. 

De aanwezigheid van de gezamenlijke buitenruimte, studio’s, huiskamer VONK en de vergaderruimten dragen bij aan de onderlinge samenwerking. De campus draait om het netwerk. Nieuwe mensen leren kennen, samenwerken, borrels, synergie, voetballen op het gras, maar ook uitbreiding van zowel het vrienden-, maar voornamelijk zakelijke netwerk. De campus omvat het Blushuis, AV Huis, Merkhuis, Posthuis, Pakhuis maar ook bedrijven als Handpicked Agencies, Grosfeld Bekkers van der Velde en Blogic Media. Men begrijpt men elkaar en spreekt dezelfde taal. De meeste units worden bevolkt met het creatiefste deel van de provincie.

Op de Triple O Campus werkt een cluster van bedrijven dat een groot scala van creativiteit vertegenwoordigt. Creativiteit op het gebied van vormgeving, film, technologie en zoveel meer. Creativiteit van het woord en ook van het beeld. 

Als creatief bedrijf gedij je goed in zo’n sfeer. Bezig met een grote opdracht? En heb je expertise nodig die je zelf niet hebt of extra handjes nodig die je tekort komt? Een paar deuren verder vind je vaak de oplossing al. Werken wordt dan snel samenwerken.

Name: Coniston Industrial Park Limited
Description:
About Us:
The “Coniston Industrial Park Limited”, also known as “CIP” is a company that was incorporated in 1990. Prior to this, the site was home to a smelter, owned and operated by “The Mond Nickel Company”. Construction of the smelter began in 1911 and the operations subsequently concluded in 1972. During this time, The Mond Nickel Company was absorbed by INCO (VALE). The smelter was later demolished in 1976 and INCO began the transforming the area into an industrial park.

Products and Services:
The CIP offers a wide range of services including but not limited to a diverse range of leasing opportunities, warehousing services, logistics, transportation, on site amenities and complimenting business operations.

The locations are mostly in and around the four major cities in the Randstad, but the objects are also located in cities such as Almere, Amersfoort, Zwolle, Groningen, Arnhem, Breda, Eindhoven and Maastricht. Name: Immo Industry Group
Description:
IIG regretfully announces that IIG Belgium filed for bankruptcy.

In September 2008, IIG was hit by the liquidation of Jersey based Belgravia Asset Management. Together with IIG’s own funds and additional funds, Belgravia invested in IIG’s projects in CEE, through project financing and the acquisition of completed projects. Belgravia’s liquidation had a significant impact on IIG’s cash flow position.

When IIG turned to the financial market to address its liquidity requirements, it was faced with a heavy storm, as the bank crisis was at its peak. The global economic crisis led financial institutions to refuse project financing to IIG, despite the fact that IIG’s business model consists of strong company guarantees by IIG’s clients. As a consequence, IIG was forced to increase its own project financing share. In addition, IIG was confronted with the effect of weakening currencies in Central Europe. As early as October 2008, IIG started negotiations towards a significant capital increase and attracting new project financing sources. In Q4 of 2008, IIG implemented a series of cost saving measures, including the departure of 16 staff members at headquarters. Earlier this month, these measures were followed up with a cost saving exercise at IIG’s foreign offices.

IIG's repeated requests to its banks to provide sufficient working capital was not heeded. The decision impacts directly on 74 employees and consultants at headquarters and indirectly on 137 employees abroad. 

The company has several important assets towards potentially interested parties: a strong sales pipeline, a portfolio with several completed or almost completed projects, a business model that works even in times of crisis and a motivated and well qualified work force.

All interested parties are invited to contact the liquidator, Mrs Marga Pieters, at marga.pieters@pandora.be

Description:
Jubilee Place, located within one of Brisbane’s most vibrant and well-established commercial hubs on the corner of St Pauls Terrace and Symes Street, Fortitude Valley, combines state-of-the-art technology and design with classic heritage to create Brisbane’s most impressive commercial development.

Jubilee Place will catalyse the revitalisation of one of Brisbane’s most treasured places, the Jubilee Hotel – an iconic gathering place that has played a much-loved part in Brisbane’s history for over a century. The development will benefit from the Hotel’s beautiful heritage character sitting alongside the modern architecture and authentic structural expression of Jubilee Place. 

Designed in an integrated manner by Blight Rayner, and currently under construction by Watpac, Jubilee Place will be a 14-storey A-Grade office asset with approximately 17,500m² NLA.

Robert Bird Group’s impressive exoskeleton structure, a response to site constraints imposed by the Clem 7 tunnel below, provides a unique design identity whilst also enabling an impressively flexible floorplate, floor to ceiling glass and unobstructed views of Brisbane’s CBD. 

Designed to inspire productivity and wellness at work, Jubilee Place is a destination focused on supporting its tenants and their people. 

In a nod to project quality and certainty, Watpac has committed to locate its head office within Jubilee Place upon completion. Co-working giant IWG’s Spaces co-working hub will also be housed on levels 1 – 5, facilitating on-site flexible workplace options.

Jubilee Place is being developed by JGL Properties in partnership with Credit Suisse Asset Management, who will be represented locally by Kirsty Smith of Kelen Property during delivery phase.

Office leasing enquiries should be directed to JLL’s Connor O'Shea or Colliers International’s Shane Van Beest.

Retail leasing enquiries should be directed to Chesters Real Estate's Greer Gittoes or Michael Platsis.

Approximately 30% of these students have been hired directly into the industry upon graduation. CREATE’s signature program is the 16-module, 32-hour Fellows curriculum facilitated by industry subject matter experts. Student Fellows learn the fundamentals of the industry and about the career opportunities in commercial real estate. The experience is enhanced by mentoring, job shadowing, building tours, internships and networking as well as the free career portal that connects students with employers offering internships and entry-level jobs.

CREATE connects students to local employers via an alliance of the following associations:
BOMA San Francisco
BOMA Oakland/East Bay
IREM San Francisco Bay Area Chapter
NAIOP San Francisco Bay Area Chapter

Strategy
 
Income Producing Opportunities
Empire invests in income-producing assets with the following characteristics:
High-Quality/Creditworthy Tenancy
Future Conversion or Repositioning Potential
Sale-Leaseback Arrangements
Transitioning submarkets with statistical and circumstantial evidence suggesting significant growth
Assets with inefficient management requiring new leasing strategies, active management, physical capital improvements, and opportunities to renegotiate undervalued leases
Unique architectural features or historical significance
 
Value-Add Opportunities
 
Empire also executes conversions and repositioning projects to realize the highest and best use of an asset, including:
Opportunities to bifurcate mixed-use assets to sell the retail, residential or office components in separate transactions while retaining others at a reduced basis
Distressed assets requiring an expedited sale due to external circumstances
Acquisition of existing assets for conversion below replacement cost
Repositioning existing assets to realize highest and best use
Development assemblage opportunities (simultaneous transactions with multiple owners of adjacent lots)
Acquisition of loans

Name: Vector90
Description:
Vector90 is a coworking space and start-up incubator located in the inner cities around the United States. We partner with local heroes and the local government to develop the space to best suit the needs of the community. Vector90’s mission is to build and bring a community of entrepreneurship to the inner cities of America, starting with our local community of Los Angeles. 

Our goals are two-fold: 1. Supporting and developing local entrepreneurs and businesses, and 2. helping eliminate opportunity gaps that exist for women and minority groups. We’re dedicated to targeting underrepresented populations, such as minority and women entrepreneurs, in the most successful sectors of the economy.

Vector90's ultimate goal is to replicate this model in inner cities throughout the United States, partnering with local influencers and the local government in each market to create spaces that are both relevant and resonant with the local community. Vector90 plans on developing intellectual and cultural hubs for entrepreneurs and creatives which will heighten the existing social and economic fabric of each neighborhood we grow into.

Året rundt er der gang i den på Brandts, hvor man både kan opleve udendørskoncerter, få sig en unik madoplevelse, gå en tur i byen, danse, se på kunst eller bare nyde menneskemylderet, de smukke gamle bygninger, en kold øl eller en kop kaffe.

Områdets kulturinstitutioner omfatter blandt andet Tidens Samling, Kunstmuseum Brandts, Kulturmaskinen Odense, Magasinet, Frølageret, Odense Filmværksted, Filmhus Fyn, Film Fyn og Odense Internationale Filmfestival.

Name: Humber Enterprise Park
Description:
Humber Enterprise Park is located on a 79-acre site to the West of Hull City Centre. 

The development is within a few minutes’ walk of Brough railway station with daily services to the North of England and Kings Cross,10 minutes’ walk of the vibrant Brough town centre and two miles drive to the M62 and motorway network. 

BAE System still occupies a significant area at the Park with other tenants including Eco Engineering, Wren Kitchens, and Supercraft Ltd. 

The site caters for companies of any size, from incubator and grow-on space for young businesses to large stand-alone facilities for more established organisations. The office spaces have undergone extensive refurbishment, a £6m project which was shortlisted for a number of construction awards. 

Office suites are available to let from 2,000 sq ft up to a full floor of 6,000 sq ft or an entire building of 18,000 sq ft.  All buildings have undergone extensive refurbishment to offer Grade A accommodation with high specification amenities, double height feature atrium and a generous eight car parking spaces per 1,000 sq ft.

HEP has a number of features that make it more than just a business park, including a gym, a perimeter running track and allotments. Perks such as free parking, and 24 hour security.

And as the former site of Robert Blackburn’s pioneering aircraft manufacturing business, the site’s heritage alone makes for an interesting story.
