Name: Midwest Manufactured Home Community Brokers
Description:
Our team was built around offering better local service to mobile home park owners throughout the midwest. Our team consists of Midwest Locals from North East Iowa, and North Central Wisconsin. 
 After several years of selling multifamily, our team lead Jason Bergan saw a need for a more local option when it comes to Mobile Home Park sales in the Midwest. We are seller focused brokers, which means we primarily represent sellers and help them get a fair price for their properties. 

Our team offers local expert service, and we offer the option to meet face to face with all of our local sellers throughout our areas of service. We do this in order to more accurately advise them on the value of their properties, and to help our clients better understand and feel comfortable with the selling process.

Through our years of experience in the Mobile Home Park industry, we have formed relationships with mobile home park lenders, owners, buyers, and supporting industry  professionals. This ensures our sellers a smooth and simple sales process. 

Our listing contracts are free to cancel at any time, and  no fees are ever due from our sellers until their  property is sold. We believe that owners should always be the final decision makers on their properties, and approach the sales process as professional advisors, not as salesmen. 

 All of our sellers have the option to keep their sale confidential. Even when we market the property, it is never listed on local platforms like the MLS, and you as the owner don’t have to worry about the residents of your property or your local community becoming aware of the sale before you want them to be. 


If you are considering selling your MHC, or if you have questions about the process or the current market, please reach out to us. 

Email the team at midwestmhcbrokers@c21sre.com

Name: Hazelvine Limited
Description:
WELCOME TO HAZELVINE

Hazelvine delivers comprehensive property management solutions to Leaseholders, Residents’ Management Companies, Developers and Freeholders. Our services, tailored to meet the specific needs of each client, are delivered by our team of highly skilled and experienced professionals.

As a business, we strive to be innovators; As part of the Qdime Group we can offer the entire residential property management solution, or any part thereof. Our ethos is to invest in our staff and in the technology that makes them efficient and effective, leaving them free to focus on exemplary communication and service.

About us-
Hazelvine was formed in 1986 by two brothers, who having moved to London and sharing a flat together were presented with their very first service charge budget. They challenged some of the cost headings, and were allowed to take over some of the services themselves, enabling them to reduce costs and offer better value for money.

What started as providing a few services to their own block grew into a business when residents from other local properties approached them and asked for their help. With backgrounds in Construction Management and accountancy, they believed they had the right knowledge base to offer a property management service.

Over the course of 30 years, the business has grown substantially, but the overriding principles the owners set themselves back then, of maintaining separate designated trust accounts for each property and always seeking value for money, remain just as strong today.

Hazelvine is now part of the Qdime Group of companies. The Group specialises in Residential Property, and comprises of three firms of managing agents; a maintenance division; a professional services company; and a firm of solicitors. As part of the group, Hazelvine is still able to offer a personal service, but with the added benefits that being part of a successful group brings.

Our Vision-
“Our vision is to be the best at what we do and to be different in our approach.”

Our services-
We provide professional property management services to a diverse client base whose needs can be very different.  Developers, owner-occupiers, buy to let investors and RMC directors can have very different agenda’s, some want to be involved in every decision and some don’t have the time so are happy to leave everything to us.

For this reason we employ specialist staff with specific areas of expertise.  Unlike most managing agents, we don’t dilute our property managers by expecting them to be a ‘jack of all trades’ we give them the time to be coordinators of their team and communicators with their clients and contractors, whilst maintaining the overall knowledge of their sites.

Name: Asbestos Audits Queensland
Description:
Asbestos Surveys, Asbestos Inspections, Asbestos Audits, Asbestos Reports, Asbestos Registers, Asbestos Risk Assessments and Asbestos Management Plans.  Call the Asbestos Experts

At Asbestos Audits Queensland we have over twenty years experience at inspecting and reporting on the presence of asbestos in buildings. You can be confident of your asbestos survey or audit results as we use only NATA accredited laboratories for our sample analysis.

We travel Australia wide from our premises on the Gold Coast. For all asbestos audit services, call us on (07) 55492250 or mobile 0407 756 440 or email us for a quote.

Commercial asbestos audit services

Did you know that from January 1 2012, all commercial buildings built before 2004 ( in Qld the build date has reverted back to 1990 as of May 2014) must have had an asbestos inspection carried out by a competent person from which an Asbestos Management Plan, Risk Assessment, Register and Report is completed if asbestos is found or assumed to be present.

Why? The National Code of Practice for How to Manage and Control Asbestos in The Workplace requires mandatory compliance of these codes.

The issue of asbestos can sometimes be a sensitive one. Our friendly staff understand this and can explain to your staff if needed, exactly what we are doing and how all but new buildings require this service.

We can inspect your building and produce an Asbestos Containing Materials Report, Register and Management Plan so that you comply with the regulations. We also offer asbestos inspections and report services for pre-demolition, pre-renovation, or sale purposes.

Andhra Pradesh Aerospace & Defence Electronics Park (AP-ADE Park) is an incipient 264 acres vibrant & eco-friendly Innovation-led manufacturing cluster focused on Aerospace, Defence & Electronics. AP-ADE Park is an initiative of the Government of Andhra Pradesh through a joint venture between Andhra Pradesh Industrial Infrastructure Corporation (APIIC) and Vittal Innovation City (VIC).

It is strategically located in Anantapur, in the designated Aerospace & Defence Zone identified by the Government of Andhra Pradesh. AP-ADE Park abuts National Highway 44 and is an hour's drive from Bangalore International Airport (BIAL) connecting Bangalore and Hyderabad. It is also in very close proximity to PSUs like BEL (<50mtr) and global manufacturers like Kia (~14kms). The park is circumvented by two major proposed Industrial Corridors of Bangalore-Chennai and Chennai-Visakhapatnam.

Many of our team members have contributed significantly to the real estate industry through service on committees with the Realtors Association of Hamilton-Burlington (RAHB) and the Real Estate Council of Ontario (RECO) and have also given back to the community through participation with various volunteer organizations in the Hamilton area.

Name: Innovative Business Advisors LLC
Description:
When your net worth is at stake, you need the expertise of a business brokerage team to walk you through every step of the buying and selling process. Innovative Business Advisors is a comprehensive business brokerage company specializing in mergers, acquisitions, and business valuations in the St. Louis Metro Area. We provide clients with the tools and information they need to successfully navigate buying a business and selling a business. 

Our certified valuation analyst can provide a complete a business valuation for the eventual sale of a company, estate/gifting purposes, or marital resolutions. A Certified Valuation Analyst can help business owners appropriately price businesses before listing them on the market. We also offer exit planning advising and business consulting to make sure your business is headed in the right direction. Specialties and services include:
•	Business valuations for estate/gifting purposes and marital resolutions
•	Exit planning for eventual sale and retirement planning
•	Consulting and financial advising for buying a business
•	Analyzing market and financial considerations for selling a business
•	Business plan development and full business consulting
•	Assistance with banking and private investor financing issues
•	Full-service commercial real estate brokering services

At Innovative, we know how much your business means to you. Our professional and courteous staff will walk you through a business purchase, sale, or eventual sale one confidential step at a time so that your business can continue to run smoothly during this time of transition. Why trust your company with just anyone? Let our professional team work with you to deliver the best possible outcome. Contact us for a free initial consultation today or sign up for our newsletter at innovativeba.com to receive our latest listings!

Our flexible approach and hands-on personal service ensures that your move is as stress-free as possible.

Description:
FTC connaît les acteurs et les codes de ce marché difficile et procédera à une approche exhaustive et systématique pour dénicher les meilleurs biens on et off-market.

Par ailleurs, il n’est pas toujours simple de se lancer dans un nouveau pays. FTC. a compris au fil des projets que nos clients avaient besoin d’un accompagnement plus complet non seulement sur la partie immobilière mais aussi sur la partie «business».

Nous avons donc développé une offre de services sur mesure et "à la carte" pour vous accompagner sur toute la phase de lancement de votre projet en amont et en aval de la partie immobilière.

Name: PiNPOiNT Business Park
Description:
PiNPOiNT est un Business Park qui réunit des entreprises et enseignes prestigieuses, triées sur le volet, dans l’univers de la maison. 

Ce concept unique à Maurice invite les entreprises renommées dans leurs secteurs d’activité et qui s’adressent essentiellement au marché de la construction, de la promotion immobilière, de la rénovation et de la décoration, à profiter d’un lieu commun incontournable pour les décorateurs d’intérieurs, les architectes et professionnels de l’immobilier.
Le Business Park s’étend sur un terrain de 4 arpents et comprend une vingtaine d’espaces  commerciaux et 265 parkings,. Les showrooms au rez-de-chaussée variant de 100 m2 à500 m2, sont proposés à la vente ou à la location. 
 
En réunissant de nombreux fournisseurs en un même lieu, réduisant ainsi le temps de recherche et de déplacement, PiNPOiNT a été conçu pour recevoir des architectes, des décorateurs ou architectes d’intérieur, des professionnels de la construction, ainsi que des promoteurs immobiliers, des hôteliers et des clients individuels. Ce cadre agréable possède  une cafétéria où il sera possible d’organiser des rendez-vous professionnels, pour plus de convivialité et de facilité. 

Le Business Park multi-enseignes offre une grande visibilité et un emplacement stratégique aux entreprises, car il est facilement accessible de l’autoroute, entre le nord et le centre.  

PiNPOiNT réunit tous les critères pour faire croître votre entreprise et sera prêt à vous accueillir dès Mai 2022.

Name: Skullerud Park
Description:
Skullerud Park er en næringspark i Oslo med marka rett utenfor kontordøra og t-banen kun to minutter unna. Totalt har 2000 personer fordelt på 200 bedrifter sin daglige arbeidsplass her. 

Som leietaker i Skullerud Park blir du del av et fellesskap og du får tilgang til alle våre flotte fasiliteter. Her får du låne elbil, tilhenger og fatbike. Våre hyggelige resepsjonister og driftspersonell hjelper deg med det du måtte ha behov for. Kantinematen lages av Norgesmester i kokkekunst og vi har flere kaffebarer, treningsrom med garderober og badstue for å nevne noe. I tillegg har vi god plass til bilen din. Velkommen på en uforpliktende visning.

Name: Vorq Space
Description:
If you’re a freelancer or a small business owner, chances are that you’re constantly in the search of affordable spots to work from. Maybe you’re working remotely from an exotic place. Maybe you and your team of innovative minds just want to work from a place that gives you the option of setting your own rules and give you a feel of home. Maybe you want to work with likeminded young and driven individual such as yourself.

So if you’re on a hunt for a coffee heaven with boast-worthy internet, a social network of dynamic professionals and a welcoming close-knit community, then Vorq is the place for you.

- Puesto flexible en espacio compartido
- Puesto fijo en espacio compartido
- Despacho privado
- Oficina privada
- Sala de Reuniones para reunirte con tu equipo o clientes.
- Salas Exprés para entrevistas y reuniones telemáticas. 

Además, contamos con varias zonas de uso común donde relajarte en los descansos, conocer al resto de coworkers o sorprender a tus clientes y socios con un delicioso café tras la reunión:

 ¿Quieres charlar tranquilamente? 
Terraza con increíbles vistas a la Iglesia de la Concepción de Nuestra Señora.

 ¿Tienes hambre? 
Cocina de libre uso equipada con todo lo que necesites.

 ¿Amante del buen café? 
Máquinas de café recién molido y de Nespresso con cápsulas disponibles siempre que te apetezca.

 ¿Quieres descansar? 
Zonas de descanso con mobiliario cómodo.

Y si tienes necesidades concretas, nos adaptamos a ti:

 ¿Trabajas en un horario especial?

Name: The Paperchain Project
Description:
paperChain—the collaborative research and innovation project funded under the European Union´s H2020 programme, and coordinated by Acciona Construction.

The paperChain Project “New Niche Markets for the Pulp and Paper Industry Waste based on circular economy approaches” intends to demonstrate the technical and environmental feasibility (TEF) of using different streams—generated in the Pulp & Paper Industry—as secondary raw material, with the aim of becoming competitive substitutes for the primary raw materials in near future. 
This Project includes five large-scale demonstrators or demo-cases in different operational environments: Construction in Portugal (asphalt mixtures and concrete in roads), Spain (stabilised-soil layers in roads) and Slovenia (composite materials for slide stabilization in railways); Chemical in Sweden (bio-ethanol for secondary chemicals); and Mining in Sweden (sealing layers for reactive spoil). 

This project has received funding from the European Union’s  Horizon 2020 research and innovation Programme under grant agreement N° 730305

Name: Catalyst Ventures Development (CVD)
Description:
Boston is a city of firsts. From the very beginning of American history, with the shot heard around the world, the people of Boston and Massachusetts have taken pride in being at the forefront of innovation and revolutionary civic planning.

The first public library, the first African American Meeting House, the first public school, the first subway, the first public garden - the lists of Boston firsts are lengthy and are hallmarks of Boston’s commitment to the health and well-being of its citizens. As a city, we should take collective pride in our achievements. And as a city, we must share collective shame in the lack of economic opportunity within our minority communities. In January 2016, the Brookings Institute named Boston as the city with the highest income inequality overlap, making Boston first at being worst.

It is my mission to help tip that balance and be a catalyst that helps position Boston as a leader in the fight against income inequality by facilitating opportunities for minority-owned businesses. If you are ready for change, are interested in innovative enterprises and want to be a part of the solution, I want to hear from you.

Description:
L’ALVEOLE est un lieu dédié aux entrepreneurs et entreprises, pensé autour du confort, de l’esthétisme et de la sérénité.

Cet espace a été étudié pour remplir toutes les attentes et besoins de nos locataires, sans charges et surcoûts potentiels : vous n’avez plus qu’à « mettre les pieds sous la table » et profiter pleinement de votre lieu de travail.

L’Alvéole est un espace qui propose plusieurs solutions d’accueil, via la location flexible : 
-	D’une salle de réunion
-	De bureaux partagés
-	D’un bureau dédié aux rendez-vous avec vos clients et partenaires


Vous serez accueillis à L’Alvéole par une équipe professionnelle, engagée pour la qualité de ses services et pour laquelle votre bien-être sera la priorité.

Située à moins de 2 minutes de la sortie d’autoroute A41  Grésy-sur-Aix  et implantée dans une zone commerciale dotée de plusieurs parkings gratuits, L’Alvéole est facilement et rapidement accessible, et proche, même à pied, de toutes commodités (grande surface, petits commerces de proximité, station-service …). 
Pour la mobilité douce, nos locaux sont proches de la gare de Grésy-sur-Aix.

Cet espace a été conçu comme une offre complémentaire aux espaces de coworking déjà existants sur notre territoire. 

En effet, ces derniers accueillent souvent beaucoup de personnes en même temps. Ça fourmille, ça interagit… Mais dans une certaine agitation et bruits ambiants. Cela peut ne pas correspondre à toutes les attentes, et certains préfèreront plus de calme et de sérénité, sans pour cela renier sur l’aspect convivial.

C’est dans cette optique que nous avons axé notre différenciation. Tout cela rassemblé dans un lieu où la décoration, le beau, l'envie de faire plaisir, la qualité des matériaux et le confort ont été au cœur de nos préoccupations et de nos choix.

Name: Inmobiliaria Dama de Elche
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada tanto a la intermediación inmobiliaria, como a la compra venta de todo tipo de inmuebles. Tramitando todo tipo de documentación, asesoramiento, búsqueda de financiación, cancelaciones y demás actos necesarios para llevar a buen fin cualquier compra-venta o arrendamiento de inmuebles.
En los últimos años nos hemos especializado en la colaboración con gestoras de fondos, llevando a cabo labores diversas como: la realización de valoraciones externas de carteras, a los efectos de evaluar la viabilidad de la adquisición; asistencia a toma de posesión; gestión y custodia de inmuebles; venta de los mismos; asistencias a notaría (con mandato verbal o por poder); liquidación de impuestos; inscripción en registros, etc. 
En la línea comentada, otra de nuestras actividades es, a través de nuestros contactos en las entidades bancarias de la zona, llevar a cabo la identificación de activos (de manera individual o en lotes) que nuestras redes de venta puedan comercializar; realizando informes económicos y de viabilidad, con presentación a inversores para su adquisición, encargándonos del resto de trámites hasta la venta de los mismos. Todo lo cual nos ha permitido posicionarnos como agentes con un alto grado de eficacia en toda nuestra zona de actuación, la cual, en la actualidad, es de las que más actividad de compra-venta de inmuebles está registrando, principalmente por el flujo de capital extranjero en cuyas redes de inversión tenemos importantes contactos. 
Contamos asimismo con un departamento jurídico capaz de adoptar posiciones de sustitución procesal respecto de las entidades acreedoras, llevando a cabo, hasta su finalización, los procesos de toma judicial y extrajudicial de inmuebles, resolviendo asimismo todas aquellas cuestiones de carácter legal que puedan plantearse en el proceso completo de identificación, adquisición, inscripción y venta de los inmuebles de referencia.

GUNAWANGSA GROUP merupakan salah satu developer properti nasional di kota Surabaya yang memfokuskan pada pengembangan properti, high rise building, residential, commercial, office dan hospitality development selama beberapa tahun terakhir ini.

GUNAWANGSA GROUP merupakan bagian dari WARNA WARNI HOLDING

Gunawangsa Group merupakan anak perusahaan dari Warna Warni Holding yang merupakan Group perusahaan Multi Nasional dengan Core Business di bidang Advertising serta Promosi, juga di bidang Telekomunikasi dan lain lain.

Warna Warni Group pada beberapa tahun terakhir memperluas bidang usahanya ke bisnis Property dengan bekerja sama dengan beberapa Pengusaha serta Partner untuk mengembangkan beberapa High rise Building, khususnya di kota Surabaya.

Adapun beberapa proyeknya adalah sebagai berikut :

Metropolis Apartment, Surabaya.
Cosmopolis Residence, Surabaya.
Trillium Office &Residence, Surabaya.
Warna Warni Holding Ikut memiliki sebagian Saham dan terlibat aktif pada seluruh proses proyek tsb sampai dengan Operational sekarang.

Untuk lebih fokus pada bisnis Property, maka Warna Warni Holding khusus membentuk Group untuk menangani di bidang Property, yaitu Gunawangsa Group. Sejak didirikan pada tahun 2009, Gunawangsa Group telah mengembangkan 2 proyek, serta mempersiapkan beberapa proyek selanjutnya.

Adapun proyek yang sudah dikembangkan adalah sebagai berikut :

Gunawangsa Manyar Apartment
Gunawangsa MERR Apartment
Gunawangsa TIDAR Apartment
Gunawangsa Gresik Superblock
Visi :

Menyediakan hunian yang terjangkau dan produk dengan kualitas terbaik bagi masyarakat.

Misi :

Memiliki reputasi sebagai developer yang konsisten dan berkomitmen untuk terus berkembang dan meningkatkan keuntungan jangka panjang, serta berguna bagi warga dan bangsa.

Name: Classic Collectives

Name: Keygrove Chartered Surveyors
Description:
Keygrove is a well established and entirely independent firm of Chartered Surveyors specialising in commercial property, operating from a landmark building in Ocean Village, Southampton. 

We offer Director level service with an emphasis on accountability. Our independent status allows us to tailor our services to our clients' needs whether starting from a 'blank sheet' or applying our skills and knowledge to an existing project. 

We provide our services to landlords, tenants, investors, owner occupiers and property professionals across the commercial property sector; including offices, industrial, warehouse, retail, motor trade and development land. We do business locally, regionally and nationally with all sizes of organisation.
 
Keygrove is regulated by the Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors (RICS) and all our surveyors are qualified as Members of the RICS or training towards qualification. Under this regulatory regime Keygrove is regularly inspected to ensure compliance with RICS best practice. Accordingly our clients have an assurance that their interests and any monies held by us are protected by the highest levels of service and security.

Please feel free to contact us for no obligation initial advice/consultation on any commercial property related matter.

Name: The Eight Building
Description:
Available now, Grade A office development in the heart of Dublin 8’s distinctive Newmarket Square. Four floors remaining, available to let immediately, contact:
Knight Frank Ireland on +353 (1) 634 2466 
OR
CBRE on +353 (1) 618 5590

Everything On Offer... 
- Superb location a 15-minute walk from St. Stephen's Green. 
- Large, open-plan office floor spaces with fantastic views of The Liberties. 
- Functional facilities include 96 bike spaces, 18 car spaces, showers and changing rooms. 
- Networking lounge perfect for meeting new people or clients over a coffee and hosting events.

This central and well-established area has long been at the forefront of the history of Dublin City. The deep-rooted locality, originally known as the centre of craft distilling and brewing in Dublin, has in recent years been transformed into one of the City’s most up-and-coming regenerated Quarters. Newmarket Square has seen a major transformation in recent years to include the newly designed Aloft Hotel, soon-to-open New Newmarket Yards accommodation catering for 400+ apartments, student accommodation and a range of retail and recreational amenities.

This vibrant district is filled with culture and provides an array of coffee shops, bars & restaurants all within easy reach. It is also known as Dublin’s premier design district and is home to NCAD, which is Ireland’s largest and oldest art and design college.

Name: Podjetniški inkubator Podbreznik
Description:
Podjetniški inkubator Podbreznik (PIP) leži na obrobju Novega mesta in je pravi kraj za nova inovativna podjetja. V urejenem poslovnem okolju s sodobno infrastrukturo in s širšim naborom svetovalnih in mentorskih storitev je v 15 letih delovanja omogočil učinkovito nastajanje in razvoj več kot 70 podjetij, ki so ustvarila preko 180 delovnih mest. Za kako kakovostno okolje gre, pove dejstvo, da je stopnja preživetja podjetij v PIP nad 90%.

Bistvo najema prostora v PIP ni zgolj ugoden najem, temveč sobivanje in sodelovanje z ostalimi naprednimi podjetji, številni poslovni dogodki ter programi, ki podjetjem ponujajo nove priložnosti za sodelovanja in razvijanja posla. Podjetja imajo na tedenski bazi na voljo številna kvalitetna izobraževanja ter dostop do novih izkušenj in širjenja prepoznavnosti podjetja. Vsa podjetja so ažurno obveščena tudi o vseh aktualnih razpisih in poslovnih priložnostih.

Pomembna skupina inkubatorja so potencialni podjetniki in mlada podjetja, katerim se preko individualnih svetovanj, mentorskih programov, startup vikendov ipd. pomaga razviti poslovno idejo. Tem skupinam je na voljo tudi ugoden coworking prostor, ki poleg samega pisarniškega prostora ponuja tudi sodobne govorilnice, kamor se je mogoče umakniti za sestanek, videokonferenco ipd..

PIP pa je preko storitve virtualne pisarne dom tudi številnim mladim podjetnikom, ki zaradi različnih razlogov na domačem naslovu ne morejo odpreti podjetja.

NAŠIM PODJETJEM NUDIMO: 
•	ugoden najem poslovnih prostorov v Novem mestu,
•      kvalitetno in urejeno poslovno okolje z brezplačnimi parkirnimi,
•	kreativno delovno okolje v coworking pisarni,
•	do 100% subvencionirane podjetniške delavnice in izobraževanja,
•	svetovanje in mentorstvo s področja podjetništva,
•	analizo in vrednotenje poslovne ideje,
•	sodelovanje z drugimi podjetniki, startupi in mentorji,
•	pomoč pri iskanju partnerjev, sodelavcev,
•	uporabo sejne sobe in projektorja,
•	pridobitev ugleda na trgu,
•	promocijo vašega podjetja…

Name: Routes For Sale
Description:
Routes For Sale is an exclusive broker for Buying or Selling a route business.

Routes For Sale was founded by Ron Slusser who has been deemed by his customers as the “Route Guru of America!” Ron started his career as an independent distributor in route sales, and later acquired his Real Estate License which further led to him becoming a Commercial Broker. Ron previously sold residential real estate and owned route distributorships through Murray Cookies, and Snyder’s Of Hanover. This is important, because not only do you have an expert when it comes to answering questions about the buying and selling process, but you also have access to someone with hands on experience who has worked in the route sales industry for over 20 years.

Buyers
Have you considered owning a route distributorship or business in route sales? You can take control of your future now! Invest in one of our highly profitable, recession proof, routes for sale today, and let us help you jump start your new career. Tired of the corporate jungle? Are you ready to build a lasting and prosperous business that has the potential to build equity?

Sellers
We have brought together tons of buyers and sellers with our targeted marketing. The flexibility of our marketing program has caused “other” brokers in the industry to take notice… Don’t list your route for sale with a standard broker who charges 10 – 12%, has no experience in route ownership, and holds you “hostage” with their contracts and cancellation fees. Nobody knows your business like you do, and most route companies take care of the majority of the paper work for you. Our job is to bring the buyers to you after qualifying them. We are experts in the industry and will assist you with the process… All for a fraction for what other brokers charge, and only when your route sells!

Name: Spring11 Advisory Services Limited
Description:
Spring11 Advisory Services Limited is a commercial real estate advisory and due diligence firm based in London.  Our core competencies include debt and equity underwriting and due diligence, transaction support, loan asset management, primary and special servicing. We have a diverse client base including investment banks, bank and non-bank lenders, private equity funds and other opportunistic debt and equity investors. Spring11 Advisory Services Limited is an affiliate of New York-based Spring11 LLC.

Spring11 is a principal-owned, non-captive advisor. Our team provides unconflicted, confidential transaction support. We offer our clients innovative, cost-effective, and flexible staffing solutions through both on-site and off-site teams. Our team comprises employees and reliable consultants ranging from Analyst to Director-level with highly specialised skill sets in specific property and transaction types across the UK, Ireland and Continental Europe.

We are a seasoned team of commercial real estate professionals with extensive experience in underwriting, originating and servicing complex, performing and non-performing capital structures. We have deep roots in the European Commercial Real Estate Industry and provide superior credit expertise paired with principal investing experience. Since inception in 2015, our team has been involved in over 30 major European debt and equity pool transactions in over a dozen European markets.

Name: Caohejing Hi-Tech Park
Description:
Caohejing Development Corporation
Founded in 1984, the Caohejing Hi-tech Park Development Corporation (CHJ) is one of China’s leading real estate developers and operators. 

We develop LEED – certified office and R & D space for more than 2,000 domestic and overseas hi-tech companies, including over 500 foreign-invested enterprises. More than forty corporations on the “Fortune Global 500” list have set up over a hundred high tech enterprises with Caohejing.

Our main campus is located centrally in Shanghai's Xuhui District, along the Middle Ring Road; we have also built and operate satellite parks around the periphery of Shanghai, including in the city’s recently launched Free Trade Zone. As Shanghai’s economy has evolved, we have opened manufacturing plants in Zhejiang and Jiangsu provinces to serve our clients’ requirements

Caohejing works with companies in the following high technology sectors: information technology; biotech and healthcare; new materials; high-end equipment (including aeronautics); automotive; clean energy; and tertiary sector services (including financial services, telecom networking, and business process outsourcing). In addition, a number of leading global brands have set up regional headquarters in our high rise office towers.

The Caohejing Innovation Center serves as a start-up incubator for firms in several emerging sectors, including mobile apps and gaming. Our experienced team assists new companies with mentoring, HR and operational support, as well as early stage funding from banks, venture capital, and angel investors.

Over the past three decades, Caohejing has developed a close network with technology parks around the world. We have dozens of “sister” technology parks around the globe, and are active members of the International Association of Science Parks.

Name: Lazrak Brokerage
Description:
Lazrak Brokerage est la filiale spécialisée en transaction, commercialisation et conseil immobilier du groupe A.LAZRAK, acteur indépendant de référence dans l’immobilier au Maroc depuis plus de 70 ans.

Nous accompagnons nos clients — investisseurs, propriétaires, promoteurs et utilisateurs — dans toutes leurs opérations immobilières : vente, acquisition, location, repositionnement ou valorisation d’actifs, en alliant expertise du terrain et vision stratégique.

Nos domaines d’intervention
Transaction & Commercialisation
Vente et location de terrains, bureaux, commerces, locaux industriels ou résidentiels
Mise en marché de projets immobiliers (résidentiel, tertiaire, mixte)
Élaboration de stratégies de commercialisation : ciblage, pricing, mix locatif, marketing
Conseil à l'acquisition
Recherche d’opportunités foncières ou bâties
Études de marché et due diligence commerciale
Accompagnement à la négociation et sécurisation des transactions
Valorisation & Arbitrage
Diagnostic stratégique des actifs
Études de repositionnement
Optimisation du rendement ou de la valeur vénale
Scénarios d’arbitrage et recommandations de cession
Une activité guidée par des valeurs fortes
Notre activité est guidée par un ensemble de valeurs fondatrices qui définissent notre éthique de travail, et de valeurs fédératrices qui assurent la cohésion de notre équipe au quotidien.

Nos valeurs fondatrices
Honnêteté : transparence dans les analyses et les échanges
Humilité : capacité d’écoute et remise en question permanente
Franchise : dire les choses clairement, sans détour
Rigueur : précision, méthode et exigence
Confiance : fiabilité dans la relation et dans les résultats
Nos valeurs fédératrices
Leadership : sens des responsabilités, capacité à entraîner
Engagement : implication totale auprès de nos clients et partenaires
Coopération : travail en équipe et intelligence collective
Une démarche éthique et conforme aux standards internationaux

Name: Atlantic Properties

Description:
Winter Trust Real Estate (English below) 

Winter Trust B.V. is sinds januari 2011 verantwoordelijk voor het administratief, technisch en commercieel beheer van het Bisonspoor Complex, bestaande uit  kantoren “Bison Office Spaces”, Winkelcentrum “Bisonspoor” en de bijbehorende appartementen "BISON apartments".

Wij werken voor particuliere beleggers en hebben meer dan 20 jaar ervaring, indien nodig werken wij samen met gespecialiseerde bedrijven. Wij vervullen daarbij altijd de regiefunctie: wij initiëren, organiseren en coördineren de werkzaamheden. U heeft dus altijd maar één aanspreekpunt, waar u als huurder met al uw vragen terecht kunt. De platte organisatiestructuur van Winter Trust draagt bij aan onze flexibiliteit.
Sinds 2011 

Since January 2011 Winter Trust BV has administrative responsibility, both technically and commercially of the Bisonspoor real estate complex in Maarssenbroek (community Stichtse Vecht). We work for, and on behalf of private investors and have over 15 years’ experience. We work closely together with specialised partners, carefully selected for their proven quality, expertise and reliability. In our directors role we initiate, organise and coordinate all activities so that our tenants have a single point of contact. Our flat organization structure contributes to our flexibility.

Name: ARES LLC
Description:
ARES, LLC is a nationwide, full-service commercial real estate development, brokerage and property services firm based in Golden, CO.  Recognized as a leader in build-to-suit User Effective workplaces, we focus on building structures that are sustainable, economical, efficient and humanistic.  The term, “User Effective” (UE), when applied to buildings,  refers to an innovative approach to building structures that contribute to improved human performance.

Name: LT Commercial Group
Description:
LT Commercial Group is a commercial real estate brokerage that specializes in retail tenant representation, landlord representation, and investment sales & purchases. We provide a high level of transparency and provide excellent customer service on a daily basis for each of our clients.

We have continued to grow and serve the Austin community with a special focus on small businesses. With our help, dozens of small businesses have been able to find locations and make investments. It has been our aim to assist Asian business owners. When they encounter language barriers and confusion about contracts or leases, we are here to help them every step of the way. We help them understand and assist them in negotiations with landlords and communicate with city officials so their business can open as soon as possible.

Our female minority-led team has risen from simply being minority females with so many challenges in the industry.  As of today, we are able to help our clients close more deals regularly with major commercial real estate firms. In 2018, we closed over $28 million in deals!  We still hold true to our beginnings and continue to take an active role in advocating for small business owners and in the Asian community as a whole. 

English and Vietnamese are spoken at this office.

Name: Beacon - SOCAYR Inc.
Description:
Beacon is a limited-liability company founded in 1998 to develop and operate a diverse portfolio of affordable housing.

SOCAYR (Spirit Of Christmas All Year Round) Inc. is a non-profit, 501c3, founded in 2001 to continue in the development and operation of affordable housing.

The Operation Division has been successful in leasing over 52 new properties since its inception. Currently, there are 90 communities comprised of 6,738 housing units in KY, IN, IL, MO & TN managed by Beacon.

Name: Q22 Warszawa
Description:
Q22 zawdzięcza swoją nazwę słowom "quality", czyli jakość oraz "quartz", ponieważ kryształ kwarcu był główną inspiracją architektów projektujących bryłę wieży. Monolityczność budynku o delikatnie przełamanych płaszczyznach oraz szklano-aluminiowa elewacja o prostych podziałach podkreślają jego dynamiczny charakter. 195-metrowy budynek mieszczący się w ścisłym centrum Warszawy przy skrzyżowaniu Al. Jana Pawła II oraz ul. Grzybowskiej zapewnia 53 807 mkw. nowoczesnej i w pełni ekologicznej powierzchni biurowej klasy premium. 

Na parterze i pierwszym piętrze znajduje się przestrzeń przeznaczona pod działalność handlowo-usługową, w której funkcjonują lokale gastronomiczne, kawiarnia, salon fryzjerski i kosmetyczny oraz pralnia. Piętro 14. oferuje zaś dostęp do centrum konferencyjnego oraz klubu fitness. 

Na pozostałych kondygnacjach mieści się powierzchnia biurowa zaaranżowana w klasie A, która zapewnia najemcom standard pracy na najwyższym poziomie. 

Do dyspozycji użytkowników biurowca Q22 w podziemnym garażu udostępnione jest 348 miejsc parkingowych, w tym stacje ładowania pojazdów elektrycznych. Ponadto trzy minuty pieszo, przy Rondzie ONZ znajduje się stacja II linii metra. 

Q22 to miejsce pracy skrojone na miarę potrzeb każdej firmy. Zróżnicowana struktura budynku bezpośrednio przekłada się na różnorodność planów pięter. Wybór strefy biurowca zależy od indywidualnych potrzeb najemców. Nowoczesne technologie pozwalają uzyskać realne oszczędności w różnym wymiarze, jak również istotnie wpływają na komfort pracy. 

Budynek uzyskał dwa ważne certyfikaty w zakresie bezpieczeństwa - BREEAM Outstanding oraz polityki środowiskowej – SGS Covid Free. Natomiast od 2021 roku korzysta wyłącznie z energii elektrycznej pochodzącej ze źródeł odnawialnych.

Name: A&A Towers
Description:
A&A Towers is a new luxury residential development situated in the Ocean Front District of the Eko Atlantic. It is located at the center of the city, which affords easy accessibility to various parts of Eko Atlantic. The A&A Towers offers modern, airy homes with cafés, restaurants, and leisure facilities.

A&A Towers designed by the renowned Turkish architect Atilla Ilhan; is an exciting development by Arkland Properties & Investment Co. Ltd. A & A tower will be a structure that is environmentally responsible and resource efficient throughout its life-cycle. From the design, construction, operation, maintenance, and renovation, it will have a positive effect on the environment and its residents.

A&A Towers will feature 98 units comprising 3 bedroom and 2 bedroom apartments, with interiors that showcase very high-level furnishings. It also includes high-quality office spaces and well designed retail spaces with mezzanine floors. With its impressive facade, stunning architecture, attractive landscape, and incredible views, this is a truly special place to call home.

A&A Towers Offers

• State of the art Infrastructure
• Central service systems
• Independent water treatment plant
• State of the art communications
• Electrical Independence
• Dedicated sewage treatment plant

Name: CABOMAQ FORESTIERI
Description:
Nosso fundador Sr. Giuseppe Forestieri vindo da Itália em 1966 formado Engenheiro
Mecânico, iniciou sua carreira na indústria de fios e cabos elétricos. Em 1976 montou
sua empresa especializada na fabricação de máquinas e equipamentos para indústria do
mesmo setor, fornecendo para grandes marcas atuantes no mercado.
Contando com sua grande experiência no ramo, em 1987 fundou a Cabomaq Forestieri
com sede na no Bairro Aricanduva onde permaneceu até 2017. Nossa nova unidade
fabril situada hoje no Distrito Industrial de Itaquera, conta com uma área de 20.000m2
projetada para atender todas as demandas de mercado com qualidade e excelência.
As exigências do nosso fundador e da atual administração é sempre tratar de forma
séria as necessidades de nossos clientes, que são cabos de alta qualidade, com
atendimento rápido e prazos de entrega cumpridos. Todos os setores trabalham de
forma atingirmos a satisfação do cliente.

Name: Retail Development Solutions.
Description:
Firma Retail Development Solutions została stworzona przez ludzi, którzy posiadają wieloletnie doświadczenie w budowaniu i rozwoju marek. Współpracujemy z sieciami handlowymi, które są już obecne, bądź dopiero chcą zaistnieć na polskim rynku. 

Nasza oferta obejmuje kompleksowe rozwiązania, które wspierają rozwój i rozpoznawalność marek. Pomagamy w wynajmie powierzchni w centrach handlowych na terenie całej Polski oraz w krajach takich jak: Czechy, Słowacja czy Węgry. Mamy ponad 15-letnie doświadczenie w rozwoju marek z różnych branż - odzieżowych, gastronomicznych, elektronicznych, obuwniczych i wiele innych. Współpracujemy z największymi międzynarodowymi sieciami handlowymi.

Naszym klientom zapewniamy całkowite wsparcie przy nowym projekcie:

- Wynajem powierzchni w centrum handlowym
- Obsługa prawna przy analizie umów zawieranych z wynajmującym 
- Negocjacje wysokości czynszów 
- Kompleksowe prace związane z adaptacją lokalu - Prace budowlane, wszelkie pozwolenia, akceptacje projektów w centrach handlowych
- Kompleksowa produkcja mebli sklepowych oraz materiałów reklamowych POS
- Projektowanie, produkcja oraz montaż wszystkich materiałów, które wspierają markę w miejscu sprzedaży.

Co nas wyróżnia? Przede wszystkim to, że posiadamy swój sprawdzony zespół ludzi, nie korzystając z usług innych podwykonawców i firm lub agencji reklamowych. Między innymi dlatego nasza oferta jest atrakcyjna cenowo, a proces decyzyjny szybki. 

Cenimy sobie długofalowe relacje. Zapraszamy do współpracy! 
---
Retail Development Solutions was created by people with years of experience in brand building and development. We collaborate with retail networks that are already present or looking to establish a presence in the Polish market.

Our offering includes comprehensive solutions that support brand development and recognition. We assist in leasing retail spaces in shopping centers throughout Poland, as well as in countries such as the Czech Republic, Slovakia, and Hungary.

Name: Razor Consulting Inc.
Description:
ABOUT US

Razor Consulting was founded on the strength of 35 years of commitment to quality connections in NYC. The integrity and trust we have was built over time and ensures high level introductions which foster the growth of new relationships. Outsourcing business development functions save staff time and preserve resources for senior leadership. Our clients are strategically introduced to individuals that have decision making influence.

 We begin with an in-depth analysis of our clients' operation and their targeted market(s) prior to reaching into our network for synergies. This allows clients to focus more time on their priorities. As an outsourced business development organization, we augment and enhance what you are doing on a day-to-day basis through utilization of our relationships and our ability to make connections at the highest level – a level you currently have not been able to reach due to time constraints.

Our clients are high performing companies with great reputations who are looking for deeper connections in the NYC market - They all meet the following criteria:

- Looking for a competitive advantage using strong relationships
- Have limited time to develop connections and find opportunities
- Agree to the commitment of a one year investment in their future

If one or more of the above statements describe your company then it may be time to contact us for an initial conversation.

Name: Westgate City
Description:
With its surface of 226.000 sqm, Westgate City is the largest shopping mall in Croatia. It opened its doors in November 2009, located west of the city of Zagreb, right next to the A2 highway. 
With 3.3 km of shop windows and 240 shops, in combination with 700 brands and over 17 restaurants and cafe bars, Westgate represents an ideal mix of diverse offer adjusted to various tastes and preferences, and at the same time it makes Westgate a largest fashion center of Croatia. 7.250 parking spaces and a private bus terminal with free bus lines to Zagreb and Zapresic certify Westgate as an excellent shopping destination.
The size of Westgate guarantees a complete and unique combination of shops which represent a variety of domestic and international brands. H&M, Reserved, Terranova, Mango, CCC, Europa 92, New Yorker, s.Oliver, C&A, Croata, Galileo, Mass, Müller are just some of the leading brands in the largest Croatian shopping destination.
Focused on the needs of a whole family, besides of the numerous children’s stores Westgate also incorporates Croatia's largest indoor playground for children - Family Park, whose surface spreads over 4.000 sqm. Westgate has been continuously following the interests of its visitors with the goal of maximum adaptation to their needs by organizing important and diverse events for all visitor groups. As a center of the top events, besides the concept of Late Night Shopping, Westgate hosts: Wedding Expo, Maternity, baby and kids Expo, Prom Expo, Pet fair, Rujanfest, Beauty Street and many others. 
Westgate is also the leading shopping mall in online and continues to develop in the research of new marketing opportunities.
